vocabulary.definition: n. 火车

vocabulary.definition: v.i. vt. (使)加倍, (使)增强, 倍增, 加强, (使)大量增加；v.t. 重复, 再做, 再说；v.i. 重折, 重迭；[计] 重复, 再作, 加强

vocabulary.context: (It should be pointed out here that the Wrights had to invent the propeller as a means of propulsion.) The double-triangle design of the plane also looks a lot like a bicycle.

vocabulary.definition: n. 朱顶雀

vocabulary.definition: n. 布告牌

vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我自己的花园就是我自己的花园，"巨人说；"我自己的花园就是我自己的花园。" "任何人都可以理解这一点，除了我自己之外，我不会允许任何人参与其中。"于是他在周围筑了一堵高墙，并竖起了一块布告栏

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 哈利一回家，所有哈利的魔法书、魔杖、长袍、大锅和顶级雨云两千扫帚就被弗农姨父锁在了楼梯下的橱柜里

vocabulary.definition: n. 猎场看守人
vocabulary.context: ...the mail arriving by owl, eating banquets in the Great Hall, sleeping in his four-poster bed in the tower dormitory, visiting the gamekeeper, Hagrid, in his cabin next to the Forbidden Forest in the grounds, and, especially, Quidditch, the most popular sport in the wizarding world (six tall goal posts, four flying balls, and fourteen players...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...猫头鹰送来的邮件，在大厅里吃宴会，睡在塔楼宿舍里的四柱床上，拜访猎场看守人海格，在禁林旁边的小屋里，尤其是魁地奇，魔法世界中最受欢迎的运动（六个高门柱、四个飞球和十四名球员......

vocabulary.definition: v. 向导( Wizard的现在分词 ); （尤指故事中的）男巫( wizard的现在分词 ); 术士; <褒>有特殊才干的人; 奇才

vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...海格，在禁林旁边的小屋里，尤其是魁地奇，魔法世界中最受欢迎的运动（六个高球门柱、四个飞球和十四名骑着扫帚的球员）

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一岁时，哈利以某种方式从有史以来最伟大的黑暗巫师伏地魔的诅咒中幸存下来，大多数男女巫师仍然不敢提及他的名字

vocabulary.definition: n. 花坛

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当达力懒洋洋地看着并吃冰淇淋时，哈利擦窗户，洗车，修剪草坪，修剪花坛，修剪和浇灌玫瑰，并重新粉刷花园长凳

vocabulary.definition: adv. 污秽地, 不洁地, 讨厌地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: "完全正确，"弗农姨父恶狠狠地说。 "我会带领他们进入休息室，介绍你，佩妮，并给他们倒饮料。八点十五分--"

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但是，如果我们的妈妈厌倦了一周的鸡蛋检查，在周六早上高兴地醒来，那么我们稍后可能会爬上我们的蓝色雪佛兰，在夜幕降临时前往星光汽车电影院

vocabulary.definition: n. 铬, 铬合金；[医] 铬(24号元素)

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为了将天空与地球分开，他们种植了一棵高大的木棉树，为所有生命腾出空间

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 六位神祇，全身覆盖着绿色和蓝色的羽毛，躺在原始水域中：制定者和塑造者、Tepew 和 Quetzal Serpent，以及 Xpiyacóc 和 Xmucané

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 斩首, 杀头, 开除；[法] 斩首, 杀头, 解雇
vocabulary.context: The Hero Twins were conceived, when their mother, Ixkik', spoke to the decapitated head of their father, Hun Hunahpu, who spit on her hand from a cacao tree.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 英雄双胞胎的诞生是在他们的母亲 Ixkik' 与被斩首的父亲 Hun Hunahpu 说话时，后者从可可树上向她的手吐了口水

vocabulary.definition: adj. 原始的, 自原始时代的；[医] 原始的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 六位神祇，全身覆盖着绿色和蓝色的羽毛，躺在原始水域中：制定者和塑造者、Tepew 和 Quetzal Serpent，以及 Xpiyacóc 和 Xmucané

vocabulary.definition: n. 神, 神性
vocabulary.context: Six deities, covered in green and blue feathers, lay in the primordial waters: the Framer and the Shaper, Tepew and Quetzal Serpent, along with Xpiyacóc and Xmucané.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 六位神祇，全身覆盖着绿色和蓝色的羽毛，躺在原始水域中：制定者和塑造者、Tepew 和 Quetzal Serpent，以及 Xpiyacóc 和 Xmucané

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 六位神祇，全身覆盖着绿色和蓝色的羽毛，躺在原始水域中：制定者和塑造者、Tepew 和 Quetzal Serpent，以及 Xpiyacóc 和 Xmucané

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有创造力的, 创作的, 产生的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们的精神本质和神奇力量赋予了地球创造力

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 玉米是一种珍贵的物质，最终成功地孕育出真正的、持久的人类

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无法辨认的,无法识别的,无法鉴定的
vocabulary.context: But over time, the garbage accumulated - bits of broken satellites, lost space wrenches, unidentifiable lumps frozen solid - until there was so much trash floating in space around Earth it was almost too dangerous to leave the surface.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但随着时间的推移，垃圾不断积累--破碎的卫星碎片、丢失的太空扳手、冻结成固体的无法识别的肿块--直到地球周围的太空中漂浮着如此多的垃圾，离开地表几乎太危险了

vocabulary.definition: adj. 狡猾的, 逃避的, 难弄的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: "当然，你不能相信你读到的一切。"全网有时可能是一个非常危险的信息来源，这就是为什么奶奶只让亚历克斯有有限的访问权限，但爱德华阅读了所有内容并记住了所有内容

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 逃跑, 跑掉

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 之后，矿工们会将月球拖到死亡区的边缘，安装推进器和陡坡器，将垃圾月球留在后面

vocabulary.definition: n. 流线, 流线型；v.t. 使成流线型, 使合理化
vocabulary.context: Since she didn't operate much in atmospheres, nothing about her needed to be streamlined.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由于她在大气层中的运作不多，所以她的一切都不需要精简

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 驱使过度, 使工作过度；n. 超速档
vocabulary.context: (When Edward's emotional programming went into overdrive, he sometimes tried to calm himself by reciting facts.) "Apparently even Hundian Junkers, who are biologically incapable of fear, won't go near them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: （当爱德华的情绪程序进入超速状态时，他有时会试图通过背诵事实来让自己平静下来。）"显然，即使是天生没有恐惧能力的洪迪亚·容克斯也不会靠近他们

vocabulary.definition: adj. 欢闹的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些垃圾英雄的激动人心的故事，每一个都比上一个更加激动人心，可以填满数据存储树的整个分支，因为，正如历史上的垃圾英雄所发现的那样......

vocabulary.definition: adv. 向前, 在前面

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 很长一段时间，亚历克斯徘徊着，被那颗饱受摧残的月亮从死亡地带的黑暗中移开，无情地朝着一颗恒星中心的毁灭的景象迷住了

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 垃圾回收者是勇敢的人类和机器人，他们冒着生命危险捕捉这些被丢弃的大块垃圾并将它们拖到船上，留下干净整洁的空间

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 基因的两个部分称为等位基因

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 较弱的一组方向称为隐性等位基因

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，他的附着耳垂的基因比朱丽叶的游离耳垂的基因弱

vocabulary.context: "Hey - if the greenhouse is still operational, do you think that means the engines might be okay too?" said Granny as they passed through the airlock onto the walkway to meet him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "嘿 - 如果温室仍在运行，你认为这是否意味着发动机也可能没问题？"当他们穿过气闸室走上走道迎接他时，奶奶说道

vocabulary.definition: v. (使)不停地来回摇动, 摇摆；n. 摇动, 摇摆
vocabulary.context: The eyebrows on his face display waggled as if in agreement.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他脸上的眉毛晃动着，仿佛在表示同意

vocabulary.contextTranslation: "嗯，地图一定有什么错误。"

vocabulary.definition: adv. 浪费地, 丰富地
vocabulary.context: Their royal color green imitates the lavishly colored plumes of this mysterious bird.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们的皇家颜色绿色模仿了这种神秘鸟的华丽羽毛

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有旋律的, 旋律美妙的
vocabulary.context: Although there are fewer quetzals, these jewel birds still glide through the lofty cloud forests singing their smooth, melodic song: " Keow-kowee-keow-k'loo-keow-keloo ." And their feathers are more precious than gold.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虽然绿咬鹃数量减少，但这些宝石鸟仍然在高耸的云林中滑翔，唱着它们流畅、优美的歌声："Keow-kowee-keow-k'loo-keow-keloo"。而且它们的羽毛比黄金还要珍贵

vocabulary.definition: adj. 辉煌的, 灿烂的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 华丽绿咬鹃的三英尺长、闪闪发光的绿色尾羽是无价的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 生苔的, 似苔的, 陈腐的
vocabulary.context: Rounded wings help the bird fly in tight spaces among mossy branches and hanging vines.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 圆形翅膀帮助鸟儿在长满青苔的树枝和悬挂的藤蔓之间的狭小空间里飞行

vocabulary.definition: adj. 饰头巾, 头式
vocabulary.context: Only kings and high priests could adorn their elaborate headdresses with the bird's twin tail feathers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 只有国王和大祭司才能用鸟的双尾羽装饰他们精致的头饰

vocabulary.definition: adj. 壁的, 壁上的, 壁似的；n. 壁画
vocabulary.context: The ancient cultures painted or carved the image of this magnificent half-bird half-serpent on stone columns, monuments, murals, and temples throughout their lands.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 古代文化在他们的土地上的石柱、纪念碑、壁画和寺庙上绘制或雕刻了这种宏伟的半鸟半蛇的图像

vocabulary.definition: adv. 从那时起, 从那时以后, 从那里起, 由此, 因此
vocabulary.context: Thence came the name
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 名字由此而来

vocabulary.definition: adj. 高的, 傲慢的, 崇高的, 高级的, 玄虚的
vocabulary.context: Although there are fewer quetzals, these jewel birds still glide through the lofty cloud forests singing their smooth, melodic song: " Keow-kowee-keow-k'loo-keow-keloo ." And their feathers are more precious than gold.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虽然绿咬鹃数量减少，但这些宝石鸟仍然在高耸的云林中滑翔，唱着它们流畅、优美的歌声："Keow-kowee-keow-k'loo-keow-keloo"。而且它们的羽毛比黄金还要珍贵

vocabulary.definition: n. 许可证, 许可, 执照, 通行证；v.t. 允许, 容许, 可能, 使放手做；v.i. 容许, 给以机会, 提供可能
vocabulary.context: It was not permitted to keep a quetzal captive.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不允许圈养绿咬鹃

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 结合, 配合, 使成对；v.i. 结合, 结亲；adj. 结合的, 成对的, 同根变形的；n. 同根变形词
vocabulary.context: They are conjugating the verbs all wrong .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们的动词变位全错了

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可销售的, 销路好的, 市场的；[经] 有销路的, 可销售的
vocabulary.context: "Sandra needs to read good literature and learn Spanish grammar." Abuela agreed and loudly ticked off the benefits of learning correct Spanish one by one: it would enrich my education; it would make me marketable; it could even find me the right husband.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "桑德拉需要阅读优秀的文学作品并学习西班牙语语法。"阿布埃拉同意了，并大声地一一列举了学习正确西班牙语的好处：它可以丰富我的教育；它可以丰富我的知识。它会让我有销路；它甚至可以为我找到合适的丈夫

vocabulary.definition: adj. <美><加> 闪光的, 耀眼的, 眩目的
vocabulary.context: Mamá pulls into the driveway of the glitzy private school, explaining that the Saturday school is held there.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 妈妈把车开进那所华丽的私立学校的车道，解释说周六学校就在那里举行

vocabulary.definition: n. 动词；[计] 动词
vocabulary.context: They are verbs!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们是动词！

vocabulary.definition: abbr. Chinese communists 中国共产党
vocabulary.context: "Buenos días, chicos," the teacher greets the class.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "Buenos días, chicos"，老师向全班同学打招呼

vocabulary.definition: n. 日光浴
vocabulary.context: Señora Peña looks like she's been out sunbathing for many years.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Señora Peña 看上去已经出去晒日光浴很多年了

vocabulary.definition: n. 单调无味, 单调的歌；adj. 单调的；v. 单调地唱
vocabulary.context: One by one, the kids read the sentences in that peculiar singsong way Abuela has.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 孩子们用阿布埃拉特有的歌唱方式一一朗读句子

vocabulary.definition: n. 流苏, 缨, 穗；v.t. 装缨于, 摘下...穗；v.i. 抽穗
vocabulary.context: The main office is identified by a flag, sky blue and white, trimmed in golden tassels.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 主办公室以一面天蓝色和白色、镶有金色流苏的旗帜为标志

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 以物质刺激鼓励
vocabulary.context: "I think it's important to incentivize people to transition away from gas," he says.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我认为激励人们放弃天然气很重要，"他说

vocabulary.definition: n. 决赛选手, 决赛队
vocabulary.context: The finalists are challenged to think like a scientist and take on big problems.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 决赛入围者面临的挑战是像科学家一样思考并解决重大问题

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 重新使用；彻底改造；重复发明（在不知他人已发明的情况下）
vocabulary.context: "I'd want them to work together for green innovation and to reinvent their products," she says.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我希望他们共同致力于绿色创新并重新发明他们的产品，"她说

vocabulary.definition: adj. 成酸的, 尖刻的, 酸性的；[机] 酸性
vocabulary.context: Over the past 250 years, human activities have warmed the planet's surface, changed weather patterns and even made the oceans more acidic.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在过去的250年里，人类活动使地球表面变暖，改变了天气模式，甚至使海洋变得更加酸性

vocabulary.definition: n. 采伐森林, 森林开伐；[法] 砍伐森森
vocabulary.context: "I'd stop deforestation and plant a ton of trees," he says.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我会停止砍伐森林并种植大量树木，"他说

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可更新的, 可恢复的, 可继续的, 可换新的, 可重复的, 可重说的；[计] 可更新, 可再生的
vocabulary.context: The Green New Deal is a proposed government program to promote renewable energy and energy efficiency.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 绿色新政是一项旨在促进可再生能源和能源效率的政府拟议计划

vocabulary.definition: n. 皮夹；[法] 皮包, 皮夹, 钱袋
vocabulary.context: If you want to force people to change, says Kevin Chengming Qian, 18, hit them where it counts - their wallets.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 18 岁的钱成明 (Kevin Chengming Qi) 说，如果你想强迫人们做出改变，就打击他们最重要的地方--他们的钱包

vocabulary.definition: adj. 慢的, 缓慢的, 迟缓的, 迟钝的, 冷漠的, 落后的；adv. 慢地, 迟缓地；v. (使)慢下来
vocabulary.context: Halting or slowing down these changes requires that people stop putting greenhouse gases into the atmosphere in high amounts.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 停止或减缓这些变化需要人们停止向大气中大量排放温室气体

vocabulary.definition: adj. 课外的, 业余的
vocabulary.context: Maybe you'll decide to get involved in an extracurricular activity or volunteer in your community.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 也许你会决定参加课外活动或在社区做志愿者

vocabulary.definition: n. 苹果手机
vocabulary.context: Maybe you could be an innovator or an inventor - maybe even good enough to come up with the next iPhone or the new medicine or vaccine - but you might not know it until you do your project for your science class.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 也许你可以成为一名创新者或发明家 - 甚至可能足以想出下一代 iPhone 或新药或疫苗 - 但你可能不知道这一点，直到你为科学课做项目

vocabulary.definition: n. 改革者, 创新者
vocabulary.context: Maybe you could be an innovator or an inventor - maybe even good enough to come up with the next iPhone or the new medicine or vaccine - but you might not know it until you do your project for your science class.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 也许你可以成为一名创新者或发明家 - 甚至可能足以想出下一代 iPhone 或新药或疫苗 - 但你可能不知道这一点，直到你为科学课做项目

vocabulary.definition: n. 大学运动代表队；大学
vocabulary.context: You're not a varsity athlete the first time you play a new sport.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当你第一次参加一项新运动时，你并不是一名校队运动员

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可以理解的
vocabulary.context: And for those of you in kindergarten, or starting middle or high school, it's your first day in a new school, so it's understandable if you're a little nervous.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对于那些正在上幼儿园、或开始初中或高中的人来说，这是你在新学校的第一天，所以如果你有点紧张，这是可以理解的

vocabulary.definition: n. 队, 群, 帮；v.i. 成群结队, 结成一伙；v.t. 使成群结队
vocabulary.context: Even when bouncing from foster home to foster home in the toughest neighborhoods in the city, she managed to get a job at a local health care center, start a program to keep young people out of gangs, and she's on track to graduate high school with honors and go on to college.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 即使在城市最困难的社区从一个寄养家庭到另一个寄养家庭，她还是设法在当地的一家医疗保健中心找到了一份工作，启动了一项让年轻人远离帮派的计划，并且她有望以优异的成绩从高中毕业并继续上大学

vocabulary.definition: adj. 杰出的, 突出的, 未偿付的, 未决定的；[经] 未解决的, 未偿付
vocabulary.context: And I want to thank Wakefield for being such an outstanding host.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我要感谢韦克菲尔德这位出色的主持人

vocabulary.definition: adv. 必然地, 必须地, 必要地
vocabulary.context: And you won't necessarily succeed at everything the first time you try.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 而且你第一次尝试时不一定会成功

vocabulary.definition: n. 痈, 红玉, 红榴石；[医] 痈
vocabulary.context: ...gold, and it was about two miles high; and she had a great golden crown on, which was about three yards high, set with brilliants and carbuncles; and in one hand she held the sceptre, and in the other the globe; and on both sides of her stood pages in two rows, all arranged according to their size, from the most enormous giant of two miles high...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...金子，大约有两英里高；她戴着一顶约三码高的金色王冠，上面镶嵌着明亮的宝石和红宝石。她一手拿着权杖，另一只手拿着地球仪。她的两侧站着两排书页，所有书页都按照大小排列，来自两英里高的最巨大的巨人......

vocabulary.definition: v.i. vt. (仅用于主语为I时,后加宾语从句)(我)想, 也许
vocabulary.context: "Oh dear!" said the wife; "and it is so dreadful always to live in this evil-smelling hovel; you might as well have wished for a little cottage; go again and call him; te­ll him we want a little cottage, I daresay he will give it us; go, and be quick."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "天啊！"妻子说； "住在这个散发着恶臭的小屋里总是太可怕了；你可能还想要一间小小屋；再去给他打电话；告诉他我们想要一间小小屋，我敢说他会给我们；走吧，快点。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 乐园, 愉快, 乐事, 快乐
vocabulary.context: And at the back of the house was a great stable-yard for horses and cattle, and carriages of the finest; besides, there was a splendid large garden, with the most beautiful flowers and fine fruit trees, and a pleasance full half a mile long, with deer and oxen and sheep, and everything that heart could wish for.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 房子的后面有一个很大的马厩场，里面有马、牛和最好的马车。此外，还有一座华丽的大花园，里面有最美丽的花朵和优良的果树，还有半英里长的花园，里面有鹿、牛、羊，以及一切你想要的东西

vocabulary.definition: n. 灯芯草蜡烛, 微不足道的人物
vocabulary.context: ...pomp; and on both sides of her there stood two rows of lights of all sizes - from the size of the longest tower to the smallest rushlight, and all the emperors and kings were kneeling before her and kissing her foot.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ......盛况；她的两侧立着两排大大小小的灯，从最长的塔楼到最小的灯芯草，所有的皇帝和国王都跪在她面前，亲吻她的脚

vocabulary.definition: n. 海岸
vocabulary.context: There was once a fisherman and his wife who lived together in a hovel by the sea-shore, and the fisherman went out every day with his hook and line to catch fish, and he angled and angled.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 从前有一个渔夫和他的妻子住在海边的一间小屋里，渔夫每天带着鱼钩和鱼线出去钓鱼，一钓一钓

vocabulary.definition: n. 伯爵
vocabulary.context: The troops were being marshalled before the door, and they were blowing trumpets and beating drums and cymbals; and when he entered he saw barons and earls and dukes waiting about like servants; and the doors were of bright gold.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 门前列兵，吹号、击鼓、钹；当他进去时，他看到男爵、伯爵和公爵像仆人一样在周围等候。门是亮金色的

vocabulary.definition: n. 雪花石膏；adj. 雪花石膏制的
vocabulary.context: So the man went home, and found the castle adorned with polished marble and alabaster figures, and golden gates.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 于是，这个人回家了，发现城堡装饰着抛光的大理石和雪花石膏雕像，还有金色的大门

vocabulary.definition: n. 节杖, 王权；v.t. 拥登王位, 授与王权
vocabulary.context: Then he went through the doors of the salon to where the great throne-room was, and there was his wife sitting upon a throne of gold and diamonds, and she had a great golden crown on, and the sceptre in her hand was of pure gold and jewels, and on each side stood six pages in a row, each one a head shorter than the other.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后他穿过沙龙的门，来到了大王座室，那里有他的妻子坐在黄金和钻石的宝座上，她戴着一顶巨大的金王冠，她手里拿着纯金和珠宝的权杖，两边站着六名侍从，每一个都比另一个短一个头

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 沮丧, 失去勇气；n. 失去勇气, 失望
vocabulary.context: And he felt very desponding, and stood trembling and said,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他感到非常沮丧，颤抖着站着说：

vocabulary.definition: n. 公爵
vocabulary.context: The troops were being marshalled before the door, and they were blowing trumpets and beating drums and cymbals; and when he entered he saw barons and earls and dukes waiting about like servants; and the doors were of bright gold.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 门前列兵，吹号、击鼓、钹；当他进去时，他看到男爵、伯爵和公爵像仆人一样在周围等候。门是亮金色的

vocabulary.definition: n. 阳台, 走廊
vocabulary.context: Rikki-tikki liked it immensely, and when it was finished he went out into the verandah and sat in the sunshine and fluffed up his fur to make it dry to the roots.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 里基-提基非常喜欢它，当它完成后，他走到阳台上，坐在阳光下，抖松他的皮毛，让它干到根部

vocabulary.definition: adj. （尤指儿童）有礼貌的，有涵养的，有教养的
vocabulary.context: ...on Teddy's shoulder, and they gave him banana and some boiled egg; and he sat on all their laps one after the other, because every well-brought-up mongoose always hopes to be a house-mongoose some day and have rooms to run about in, and Rikki-tikki's mother (she used to live in the General's house at Segowlee) had carefully told Rikki what to do if...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...在泰迪的肩膀上，他们给了他香蕉和一些煮鸡蛋；他一个接一个地坐在他们所有人的腿上，因为每一只受过良好教育的猫鼬都希望有一天能成为一只家猫鼬，并有房间可以跑来跑去，而里奇-提奇的母亲（她以前住在塞戈利将军的房子里）仔细地告诉过里奇如果......该怎么办

vocabulary.definition: n. 宿营地
vocabulary.context: This is the story of the great war that Rikki-tikki-tavi fought single-handed, through the bath-rooms of the big bungalow in Segowlee cantonment.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是关于 Rikki-tikki-tavi 在 Segowlee 军营大平房的浴室里单枪匹马进行的伟大战争的故事

vocabulary.definition: n. 平房
vocabulary.context: This is the story of the great war that Rikki-tikki-tavi fought single-handed, through the bath-rooms of the big bungalow in Segowlee cantonment.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是关于 Rikki-tikki-tavi 在 Segowlee 军营大平房的浴室里单枪匹马进行的伟大战争的故事

vocabulary.definition: n. 药棉, 原棉
vocabulary.context: They took him into the house, and a big man picked him up between his finger and thumb, and said he was not dead but half choked; so they wrapped him in cotton-wool, and warmed him, and he opened his eyes and sneezed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们把他带进屋里，一个大个子男人用手指和拇指把他抱起来，说他没有死，只是半窒息了；于是他们用棉絮把他包裹起来，让他暖和起来，他睁开了眼睛，打了个喷嚏

vocabulary.definition: adj. 非常寂静的, 一动也不动的
vocabulary.context: They sat stone-still, and their faces were white.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们一动不动地坐着，脸色苍白

vocabulary.definition: n. 麝鼠
vocabulary.context: Rikki-tikki was too well bred to bite or scratch, but as soon as Teddy was asleep he went off for his nightly walk round the house, and in the dark he ran up against Chuchundra, the muskrat, creeping round by the wall.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 里基-提基的教养太好了，不会咬或抓，但泰迪一睡着，他就开始在夜间绕着房子散步，在黑暗中，他遇到了在墙边爬行的麝鼠 Chuchundra

vocabulary.definition: adj. 红眼的，眼圈哭红的
vocabulary.context: Let us sing about the great, the red-eyed Rikki-tikki!" and Darzee filled his throat and sang.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 让我们歌颂伟大的红眼瑞奇-提奇！"达奇填满喉咙唱了起来

vocabulary.definition: n. 铜匠, 铜器制造人；[建] 铜匠
vocabulary.context: Tell the Coppersmith, Darzee, and he will tell the garden that Nagaina is dead."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 告诉铜匠，达奇，他就会告诉花园纳格伊娜死了。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 窗玻璃
vocabulary.context: The house was as still as still, but he thought he could just catch the faintest scratch-scratch in the world, - a noise as faint as that of a wasp walking on a window-pane, - the dry scratch of a snake's scales on brick-work.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 房子一动不动，但他觉得自己能捕捉到世界上最微弱的刮擦声--一种微弱的声音，就像黄蜂在窗玻璃上行走的声音--蛇鳞在砖墙上的干燥刮擦声

vocabulary.definition: n. 满盘, 一盘
vocabulary.context: Here she slept at night, but during the day she amused herself on a table, where the woman had placed a plateful of water.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她晚上就睡在这里，但白天她就在桌子上玩耍，那女人在桌子上放了一盘水

vocabulary.definition: adv. 轻视地, 疏忽地
vocabulary.context: He was rich and learned, no doubt, but he always spoke slightingly of the sun and the pretty flowers, because he had never seen them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 毫无疑问，他既富有又博学，但他总是轻蔑地谈论太阳和美丽的花朵，因为他从未见过它们

vocabulary.definition: n. 雄蕊, 雄性花蕊；[医] 雄蕊
vocabulary.context: Within the flower, upon the green velvet stamens, sat a very delicate and graceful little maiden.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 花里，绿色天鹅绒的雄蕊上，坐着一位非常精致、优雅的小姑娘

vocabulary.definition: n. 金龟
vocabulary.context: Presently a large cockchafer flew by; the moment he caught sight of her, he seized her round her delicate waist with his claws, and flew with her into a tree.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不久，一只大金龟飞过；他一看到她，就用爪子抓住她的细腰，带着她飞到了一棵树上

vocabulary.definition: n. 大麦粒
vocabulary.context: "Here is a barleycorn of a different kind to those which grow in the farmer's fields, and which the chickens eat; put it into a flower-pot, and see what will happen."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "这里的大麦玉米与农田里生长的大麦玉米不同，鸡吃的是这种大麦；把它放进花盆里，看看会发生什么。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 水百合, 睡莲
vocabulary.context: We will place her on one of the water-lily leaves out in the stream; it will be like an island to her, she is so light and small, and then she cannot escape; and, while she is away, we will make haste and prepare the state-room under the marsh, in which you are to live when you are married."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们将把她放在溪边的一片睡莲叶子上；对她来说，它就像一座岛屿，她那么轻，那么小，然后她就无法逃脱；等她不在的时候，我们就赶紧在沼泽地下面准备好特等舱，你结婚后就住在那里。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 毛织品；adj. 羊毛制的
vocabulary.context: They must be both woollen and linen.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们必须是羊毛和亚麻的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 发出磷光的, 闪磷火的, 磷光性的；[医] 磷光的
vocabulary.context: The mole took a piece of phosphorescent wood in his mouth, and it glittered like fire in the dark; then he went before them to light them through the long, dark passage.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 鼹鼠嘴里叼了一块发磷光的木头，它在黑暗中像火一样闪闪发光；然后他走到他们前面，照亮他们穿过又长又黑的通道

vocabulary.definition: n. 先令；[经] 先令
vocabulary.context: "Thank you," said the woman, and she gave the fairy twelve shillings, which was the price of the barleycorn.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "谢谢你，"女人说，然后她给了仙女十二先令，这是大麦的价格

vocabulary.definition: n. 近日点, 最高点, 顶点
vocabulary.context: Earth is nearest the sun, or at "perihelion," in January when it's about 91 million miles away.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 地球在一月份距离太阳最近，或者说在"近日点"，距离太阳大约 9100 万英里

vocabulary.definition: n. 远日点
vocabulary.context: Earth is farthest from the sun, or at "aphelion," in July when it's about 95 million miles away.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 地球距离太阳最远的时间是 7 月，即"远日点"，距离太阳约 9500 万英里

vocabulary.definition: n. 新鲜的空气, 臭氧, 使人愉快的影响；[化] 臭氧
vocabulary.context: They also measure gases in the atmosphere, such as ozone and carbon dioxide.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们还测量大气中的气体，例如臭氧和二氧化碳

vocabulary.definition: adj. 最南的
vocabulary.context: The southernmost point on Earth is called the South Pole.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 地球的最南端称为南极

vocabulary.definition: n. 夜间
vocabulary.context: Areas facing away from the sun experience nighttime.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 远离太阳的区域经历夜间

vocabulary.definition: adj. 连续的, 继续的, 连续不断的；[计] 连续的
vocabulary.context: The North Pole and South Pole have continuous daylight or darkness depending on the time of year.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 北极和南极根据一年中的不同时间有连续的白天或黑暗

vocabulary.definition: n. 饥荒, 缺乏, 饥饿
vocabulary.context: It also helps public health officials track disease and famine.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它还帮助公共卫生官员追踪疾病和饥荒

vocabulary.definition: n. 交互作用, 交感；[计] 交互作用
vocabulary.context: Earth system science is the study of interactions between and among Earth's different parts.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 地球系统科学是研究地球不同部分之间相互作用的学科

vocabulary.definition: v. （声音）尖锐的, 刺耳的, 高频率的( shrill的现在分词 ); 凄厉
vocabulary.context: It was a city full of the aliens, shrilling and trilling like startled birds, more and more of them crowding around.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那是一座充满了外星人的城市，他们像受惊的鸟儿一样尖叫，越来越多的外星人聚集在周围

vocabulary.definition: v. （声音）尖锐的, 刺耳的, 高频率的( shrill的过去式和过去分词 )
vocabulary.context: The leaders reared back, and the crowd shrilled in protest.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 领导人后退，人群尖叫抗议

vocabulary.definition: n. (衣饰上的)皱边, 皱边纸饰；v.i. 起边皱；v.t. 折成皱边
vocabulary.context: Instead of hair, the aliens had elaborate frills flickering and fluttering from the sides of their heads.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 外星人没有头发，而是在头部两侧闪烁着精致的褶边

vocabulary.definition: n. 使改变信仰的人, 炼钢炉, 吹风转炉, 换流器, 变压器, 变换器, 变频器, 密码机；[计] 转换器
vocabulary.context: Hanging like earrings from the leaders' frills were the power converters missing from the thrusters.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 推进器上缺少的电源转换器像耳环一样悬挂在领导者的褶边上

vocabulary.definition: adj. 类人的
vocabulary.context: Tall, with oddly shaped heads, humanoid but not humans, the figures gave off their own light that brightened and dimmed as the dust swirled around them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些人物身材高大，头部形状奇特，是人形但不是人类，它们发出自己的光芒，随着周围的尘埃旋转而忽明忽暗

vocabulary.definition: n. 奶奶, 老奶奶, 老婆婆, 外婆, 婆婆妈妈的人, 唠叨挑剔的人, 接生婆
vocabulary.context: Granny the Captain, Edward the First Mate (an Artificial Intelligence), and young Alex live on The Amber Cow, a junk ship designed to deal with any garbage that comes its way.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 船长奶奶、大副爱德华（人工智能）和年轻的亚历克斯住在琥珀牛号上，这是一艘专门用来处理沿途垃圾的垃圾船

vocabulary.definition: adv. 急切地；迫切地；紧急地
vocabulary.context: "The star, Granny!" Alex whispered urgently.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "星星，奶奶！"亚历克斯急切地低声说道

vocabulary.definition: n. 选择权, 挑选, 选项；[计] 选项
vocabulary.context: The translator asked the Singers what language group they would like to hear the message in, offering dozens of options.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 翻译询问歌手们希望用哪个语言群体听到信息，并提供了数十个选项

vocabulary.definition: n. 链轮齿；[机] 链轮
vocabulary.context: "And tell them not to forget to check that the sprocket spracket in Thruster 4 doesn't overheat," added Granny.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "并告诉他们不要忘记检查 Thruster 4 中的链轮不会过热，"奶奶补充道

vocabulary.definition: n. 程式设计, 程序编排；节目制作
vocabulary.context: I never got the hang of them myself, and they're not in Edward's programing - but you know how.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我自己从来没有掌握过它们的窍门，而且它们也不在爱德华的编程中--但你知道怎么做

vocabulary.definition: n. 碾碎机, 打击；[化] 破碎机; 压碎机; 轧碎机
vocabulary.context: There was a tremendous juddering and creaking from all over The Amber Cow and even worse noises from the moon - terrible shrieks and groans as if it were being fed into a crusher.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 琥珀牛号各处都传来巨大的颤动和吱吱声，甚至来自月球的更糟糕的噪音--可怕的尖叫声和呻吟声，就像它被送进破碎机一样

vocabulary.definition: n. 声调急剧变化, 颤抖；v.i. 颤抖
vocabulary.context: There was a tremendous juddering and creaking from all over The Amber Cow and even worse noises from the moon - terrible shrieks and groans as if it were being fed into a crusher.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 琥珀牛号各处都传来巨大的颤动和吱吱声，甚至来自月球的更糟糕的噪音--可怕的尖叫声和呻吟声，就像它被送进破碎机一样

vocabulary.definition: v. 猛击, 打坏；n. 猛撞, 猛击
vocabulary.context: The crystals may have micro cracks - they're not meant to be bashed about - and the engines may not ever have been strong enough, even when they were new, to break the moon free.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 晶体可能有微裂纹--它们不应该被猛烈撞击--而且发动机可能不够强大，即使它们是新的，也无法将月球释放出来

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 同类相食, 拆用...的配件, 调拨...的人员；v.i. 同类相食, 拆用配件, 调拨人员
vocabulary.context: She'd have to cannibalize ones she'd already made - adapt parts of them - put them together -
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她必须拆解她已经制作的那些 - 改编它们的一部分 - 将它们放在一起 -

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使过热；v.i. 变得过热
vocabulary.context: "And tell them not to forget to check that the sprocket spracket in Thruster 4 doesn't overheat," added Granny.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "并告诉他们不要忘记检查 Thruster 4 中的链轮不会过热，"奶奶补充道

vocabulary.context: The tall Singers unclasped the crystals from their frills and set them carefully down on the floor in front of Granny.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 高个子歌手们从褶边上解开水晶，小心地将它们放在奶奶面前的地板上

vocabulary.context: Alex pulled up the coding for the hologram she'd been working on - the one of Treasure leaping from ball to ball - and removed the tiger.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 亚历克斯调出了她一直在制作的全息图的编码--宝藏从一个球跳到另一个球的编码--并移除了老虎

vocabulary.definition: adv. 灵巧地；熟练地；敏捷地
vocabulary.context: deftly, the way my father did
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 巧妙地，就像我父亲那样

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 蒸笼里有鳟鱼

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 用姜片调味，

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 兄弟、姐妹、妈妈谁会

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的家人在那里有房产，他说我们周末要去那里玩一种叫做彩弹射击的游戏

vocabulary.context: I would see them doing this, and then I would come up with a kind of watered-down version of another guerrilla tactic, just to play with them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我会看到他们这样做，然后我会想出另一种游击战术的淡化版本，只是为了和他们一起玩

vocabulary.definition: adj. 激动的; 兴奋的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后每个人都准备好了，他们都兴奋起来，所有人都说，"是的，我们要出去了！

vocabulary.context: I'm going to show you how it's done!" I thought to myself, First rule of warfare, you never belittle your opponent.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我将向你展示它是如何做到的！"我心想，战争的第一条规则是，你永远不要贬低你的对手

vocabulary.context: After about a year of being friends with these boys, one of them decided to invite a group of us, about ten of us, to upstate New York.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 与这些男孩成为朋友大约一年后，其中一个决定邀请我们一群人，大约十个人，去纽约州北部

vocabulary.definition: adv. 极大地; 极端地; 极其; 非常

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我非常喜欢听他们说话，因为我希望，当我听他们说话时，我所知道的唯一暴力就是我想象的暴力

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我会看到他们这样做，然后我会想出另一种游击战术的淡化版本，只是为了和他们一起玩

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对他们来说，我只是一个来自非洲国家、住在东村的孩子就足够了

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使非神秘化
vocabulary.context: For 20 years, Stanford University psychologist Carol Dweck has been dedicated to demystifying the power of mindset.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 20 年来，斯坦福大学心理学家卡罗尔·德韦克 (Carol Dweck) 一直致力于揭开心态力量的神秘面纱

vocabulary.definition: n. 石蕊；[化] 石蕊
vocabulary.context: These kids saw the math problems as an opportunity to learn, rather than a litmus test of their personal value.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些孩子将数学问题视为学习的机会，而不是个人价值的试金石

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 预先处置, 使预先有倾向
vocabulary.context: In one of Dweck's early studies, she gave kindergarten students a questionnaire to determine which ones were predisposed to a fixed versus growth mindset.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在德韦克的一项早期研究中，她给幼儿园的学生做了一份调查问卷，以确定哪些学生倾向于固定心态和成长心态

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使内在化
vocabulary.context: And when they did fail, they did not internalize the failure and take it as a statement about how good or smart they are.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当他们确实失败时，他们并没有将失败内在化，并将其视为对他们有多优秀或聪明的陈述

vocabulary.definition: adv. 专业地；内行地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们都经历过个人和职业上的艰难时期

vocabulary.definition: n. 调查表, 问卷；[经] 调查表

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 温斯顿·丘吉尔两次未能通过桑德赫斯特皇家军事学院的入学考试

vocabulary.definition: adv. 深深地, 深切地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她的工作包括多项研究，这些研究表明，您对自己采取的观点会深刻影响您的生活方式（更不用说，您如何领导他人）

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 作为勺子或复杂的

vocabulary.definition: n. 知识, 学问, 认识, 知道
vocabulary.context: Knowledge and tools:
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 知识和工具：

vocabulary.definition: adj. 变化的, 变性的, 变态的；[医] 变态的
vocabulary.context: There are three forms of rock: igneous, sedimentary, and metamorphic.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 岩石有三种形式：火成岩、沉积岩和变质岩

vocabulary.definition: n. 化石化, 固定化, 使陈腐
vocabulary.context: For fossilization to occur, an organism must contain hard parts, such as a skeleton or a shell.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 要发生化石化，生物体必须含有坚硬的部分，例如骨骼或外壳

vocabulary.definition: adj. 火的, 似火的, 火成的
vocabulary.context: There are three forms of rock: igneous, sedimentary, and metamorphic.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 岩石有三种形式：火成岩、沉积岩和变质岩

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使结晶, 使具体化；v.i. 结晶, 具体化
vocabulary.context: Some igneous rocks form when magma rises to the surface through cracks or volcanoes, and cools. Other igneous rocks form when magma crystallizes within Earth's crust. The word igneous means "fiery." Igneous rock does not contain fossils because the lava is so hot it burns any animals and plants it touches.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一些火成岩是当岩浆通过裂缝或火山上升到地表并冷却时形成的。其他火成岩是当岩浆在地壳内结晶时形成的。火成岩一词的意思是"炽热的"。火成岩不含化石，因为熔岩非常热，会燃烧它接触到的任何动物和植物

vocabulary.definition: v. 使成化石( fossilize的过去式和过去分词); 使陈腐; 变成化石; 变陈腐
vocabulary.context: Coprolites are fossilized animal waste.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 粪化石是动物粪便化石

vocabulary.definition: n. 印记, 印, 分；[计] 标志
vocabulary.context: Trace fossils are markings left behind by an organism such as footprints, trails, burrows, and nests.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 痕迹化石是生物体留下的标记，例如脚印、小径、洞穴和巢穴

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 压缩, 压紧；v.i. 受压缩小；[计] 压缩程序
vocabulary.context: The word sediment means "something that settles." Sedimentary rocks are a mixture of dust, sand, mud, shells, corals, and other materials that settle underwater or on land, and compress under pressure.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 沉积物一词的意思是"沉淀的东西"。沉积岩是灰尘、沙子、泥土、贝壳、珊瑚和其他沉积在水下或陆地上并在压力下压缩的物质的混合物

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 向后退, 退却, 收回, 降低, 减弱；[医] 退缩
vocabulary.context: Today, scientists know that oceans at one time covered most of Earth then receded, leaving behind dry land.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 今天，科学家们知道，海洋曾经覆盖了地球的大部分地区，然后消退，留下了干燥的土地

vocabulary.definition: n. 记录, 履历, 档案, 审判记录, 最高纪录, 唱片；v.t. 记录, 记载, 标明, 将...录音；v.i. 记录, 录音, 可被录音；adj. 创纪录的；[计] 录制, 记录
vocabulary.context: Fossils provide a record of life on Earth.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 化石提供了地球上生命的记录

vocabulary.definition: n. 垒球（运动）( softball的复数形式 )
vocabulary.context: She drew the vine on the softballs in her closet and on her bat, and she even doodled it on the small tags of her stuffed animals.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她在衣柜里的垒球和球棒上画了藤蔓，甚至在毛绒动物的小标签上涂鸦

vocabulary.definition: v. 腐朽；崩坏；使腐朽(molder的现在分词)
vocabulary.context: All it would take was for her to get one close look at Ivy's hair or to inhale one big whiff of Ivy's moldering smell, and her mother would order her into a big tub of warm water and soap.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她只需要仔细看看艾薇的头发，或者吸入一大股艾薇腐烂的气味，她的母亲就会命令她进入一大桶温水和肥皂

vocabulary.definition: n. 毛巾, 浴巾
vocabulary.context: She grabbed a dry washcloth and scrubbed till her skin hurt, but the vine kept growing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她抓起一块干毛巾擦到皮肤发痛，但藤蔓仍在生长

vocabulary.definition: adj. 成块的, 成丛的, 多块的；[建] 笨重的, 块的
vocabulary.context: Her hair, which had once been soft and wavy, was now thick and clumpy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她的头发曾经是柔软的、卷曲的，现在却变得又密又浓密

vocabulary.definition: v. 用洗发剂洗头( shampoo的过去式和过去分词 )
vocabulary.context: So she held her left hand toward the back of the shower and soaped and shampooed with her right.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 于是，她将左手伸向淋浴间的后面，用右手抹肥皂和洗头

vocabulary.definition: n. 前置词, 介词
vocabulary.context: Jameson had been reviewing that day's homework assignment - a long worksheet on prepositions - so she'd peered down to check what was there.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 詹姆森一直在复习当天的家庭作业--一张关于介词的长工作表--所以她低头检查那里有什么

vocabulary.definition: n. 少量, 轻拍, 比目鱼, 熟手；v. 轻拍, 轻擦
vocabulary.context: Stepping out of the shower, Ivy slipped into her bathrobe and dabbed her hand lightly with a towel, careful not to wipe or smear.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 走出淋浴间，艾薇穿上浴袍，用毛巾轻轻擦拭手，小心不要擦拭或涂抹

vocabulary.definition: adj. 涂着肥皂的, 谄媚的, 圆滑的
vocabulary.context: And when the last crusts of dirt had peeled off and floated down the drain, when she was finally clean, she would dress in newly washed clothes and hug her mother and say she was sorry - she was so, so sorry - and she'd let her mother hold her and breathe in her soapy, perfumey scent for hours.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当最后一层污垢剥落并漂入下水道时，当她终于干净时，她会穿上新洗的衣服，拥抱她的母亲，说她很抱歉--她非常非常抱歉--然后她会让母亲抱着她，呼吸着她肥皂般的香水味几个小时

vocabulary.definition: n. 调节器, 土壤团粒结构促进剂；[计] 调节器, 整形器
vocabulary.context: And then she would use body wash - all she could find - and an anti-acne face scrub and globs and globs of conditioner.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后她会使用沐浴露--她能找到的所有东西--以及抗粉刺面部磨砂膏和大量的护发素

vocabulary.definition: n. 摆动, 摇晃, 不稳定, 抖动；v.i. 摇晃, 摇摆, 游移不定；v.t. 使摇摆, 使颤动
vocabulary.context: as you wobbled away
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当你摇摇晃晃地走开时

vocabulary.definition: n. 短距离赛跑；v.i. 全速跑, 冲刺；v.t. 全速跑过
vocabulary.context: sprinted to catch up,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 奋力追赶，

vocabulary.definition: n. 曲线, 弯曲, 曲线球；v.t. 弯, 使弯曲；v.i. 成曲形
vocabulary.context: ahead down the curved
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 沿着弯道向前走

vocabulary.definition: n. 轮子, 车轮, 轮, 方向盘, 旋转, 机构, 重要人物；v.t. 使旋转, 转动, 使转向；v.i. 旋转, 转弯, 盘旋
vocabulary.context: on two round wheels,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在两个圆轮上，

vocabulary.definition: n. 哗啦声, 猛撞, 崩溃, 粗布；v. 撞碎, 破碎, (使)...坠毁；adj. 速成的；[计] 崩溃
vocabulary.context: of your crash as I
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你和我一样崩溃

vocabulary.definition: n. 笑, 笑声；[医] 笑, 大笑
vocabulary.context: with laughter,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 伴随着笑声，

vocabulary.definition: adj. 领先的, 预先的, 向前的；adv. 领先, 预先, 向前, 胜于, 在前面, 在将来
vocabulary.context: ahead down the curved
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 沿着弯道向前走

vocabulary.definition: num. 八, 八个
vocabulary.context: at eight to ride
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 八点骑车

vocabulary.partOfSpeech: n. / adj. / prep. / adv. / v.t. / v.i.
vocabulary.definition: n. 圆, 圆形物, 巡回, 循环, 一轮, 一回合, 一局, 范围, 轮唱；adj. 圆的, 球形的, 丰满的, 肥胖的, 完全的, 大概的, 完美的, 圆润的；prep. 围着, 附近, 绕过, 在...周围；adv. 围绕着, 在周围, 迂回地, 挨个, 朝反方向；v.t. 弄圆, 使成圆形, 绕行, 完成, 围捕, 把...四舍五入；v.i. 变圆, 发胖, 环行, 拐弯, 进展
vocabulary.context: on two round wheels,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在两个圆轮上，

vocabulary.definition: n. 大鸨
vocabulary.context: When her father released him to hunt the bustard, the falcon would be eager, even desperate, for the chase.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当她的父亲放他去猎鸨时，猎鹰会急切地、甚至绝望地追逐猎物

vocabulary.definition: adj. 杏眼的; 机警的, 目光锐利的
vocabulary.context: Then she saw the beady-eyed falcon.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后她看到了那只珠眼猎鹰

vocabulary.definition: n. 跳鼠；[医] 飞鼠(后腿长的鼠类动物)
vocabulary.context: She'd been feeding Flyer for weeks, even trapping mice and jerboa to make him hungry for fresh meat.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她已经喂弗莱尔好几个星期了，甚至捕捉老鼠和跳鼠，让他渴望新鲜的肉

vocabulary.definition: n. [气]夏马风(中亚及波斯湾一带的一种寒冷的西北风)
vocabulary.context: She would never find her way back to the family tent in this shamal .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在这个沙玛尔里，她永远找不到回到家庭帐篷的路

vocabulary.definition: adj. 在高空飞行的, 有野心的, 浮夸的
vocabulary.context: Without the glory and grace of their high-flying brothers, they frantically fluttered as they tried to escape their fate.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 没有了那些高飞兄弟的荣耀和优雅，他们疯狂地扑腾着，试图逃脱自己的命运

vocabulary.definition: n. 悬崖, 断崖, 绝壁
vocabulary.context: She headed straight for the rocky escarpment and her secret retreat under the stone ledge.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她直奔岩石悬崖和石壁下的秘密隐居处

vocabulary.definition: adv. 跛行地, 勉强地
vocabulary.context: The startled falcon flapped its right wing but the left wing hung limply.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 受惊的猎鹰拍打着右翼，但左翼无力地垂下

vocabulary.definition: adj. 反抗的, 反对的, 顽抗的；n. 反抗者, 顽抗者
vocabulary.context: Only Mariam's grandmother, her wrist still bound after a fall from the recalcitrant camel, had looked at her with love and understanding.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 只有玛丽雅姆的祖母，从顽固的骆驼上摔下来后，手腕仍然被绑着，用爱和理解的目光看着她

vocabulary.definition: adj. 纵长的；adv. 纵长地
vocabulary.context: She folded the scarf lengthwise to make a soft bandage, then drew the tips of the wings together along the centerline of the falcon's back.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她将围巾纵向折叠成柔软的绷带，然后沿着猎鹰背部的中心线将翅膀的尖端拉在一起

vocabulary.definition: n. 边缘, 折边, 哼声；v.t. 缝边, 包围, 关闭；v.i. 做折边, 发哼声；interj. 哼
vocabulary.context: Mariam felt as trapped and hemmed in now, at twelve years of age, as she had when she was four.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 玛丽雅姆现在十二岁了，她感觉自己被困住了，就像她四岁时一样

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 预先包装
vocabulary.context: Priya opened the cupboard and stared at the prepackaged baking mix her mother had bought at the big indoor supermarket.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Priya 打开橱柜，盯着她妈妈在大型室内超市买的预包装烘焙混合物

vocabulary.definition: adj. 丝状的, 像丝的, 细长的
vocabulary.context: "It's ready, Mummy," she said, seeing the syrup form a threadlike string between her fingers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "准备好了，妈妈，"她说，看到糖浆在她的手指间形成了一条线状的绳子

vocabulary.definition: n. (=khurta)(印度人穿的)无领长袖衬衫
vocabulary.context: Mummy had worn her beautiful green salwar kurta, more casual than a sari but still elegant and flowing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 妈妈穿着她美丽的绿色萨尔瓦库尔塔，比纱丽更休闲，但仍然优雅和飘逸

vocabulary.definition: adj. 全是泡沫的, 起泡沫的, 泡沫的
vocabulary.context: Priya watched the waxy butter slowly turn to foamy liquid.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Priya 看着蜡质黄油慢慢变成泡沫液体

vocabulary.definition: n. 莎丽(印度妇女用的裹身布)
vocabulary.context: She imagined all her mother's beautiful saris and salwar suits buried in the back of the closet, replaced by blue jeans, sundresses, and crisp American slacks.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她想象她母亲所有漂亮的纱丽和萨尔瓦套装都埋在衣柜后面，取而代之的是蓝色牛仔裤、背心裙和挺括的美式休闲裤

vocabulary.definition: adv. 指向地；尖锐地
vocabulary.context: They moved to Iran when she was very young, and she grew up there." Priya's mother eyed her pointedly.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当她很小的时候，他们就搬到了伊朗，她在那里长大。"Priya 的母亲尖锐地看着她

vocabulary.definition: n. 小把, 小物体, 纤细的东西；v.t. 把...卷成小把
vocabulary.context: Her long, ebony hair was pulled into a braid, but as she worked at crushing the seeds, wisps of hair blew forward and back around her face, like a curtain near an open window.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她长长的乌木头发被扎成辫子，但当她努力压碎种子时，一缕缕头发在她的脸上前后飘动，就像一扇开着的窗户附近的窗帘

vocabulary.definition: adj. 累人的, 烦人的
vocabulary.context: After the peanut butter sandwiches had grown tiresome, she had begun buying lunch at the cafeteria.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 花生酱三明治吃腻了，她开始在自助餐厅购买午餐

vocabulary.definition: n. 说故事的人, 故事作者
vocabulary.context: He was also one of the best storytellers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他也是最好的讲故事的人之一

vocabulary.definition: n. 屋顶, 室顶；v.t. 给...盖屋顶, 遮蔽
vocabulary.context: Together, husbands and wives removed leaves from the roofs of their houses, washed them in the river, and dried them in the sun.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 丈夫和妻子一起从屋顶上取下树叶，在河里清洗，然后在阳光下晒干

vocabulary.definition: n. 村民
vocabulary.context: Just as he was about to stop pulling the leaves, he saw his wife and all the villagers watching him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 正当他准备停止拔树叶时，他看到他的妻子和所有的村民都在看着他

vocabulary.definition: adj. 吃惊的
vocabulary.context: They were astonished.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们很惊讶

vocabulary.definition: n. 离婚；v.t. 与...离婚
vocabulary.context: He had forgotten that when either the husband or the wife pulls all the leaves off the roof of their house, it means "I divorce you; we will no longer live beneath the same roof."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他忘记了，当丈夫或妻子把屋顶上的叶子全部扯下来时，就意味着"我跟你离婚，我们不再生活在同一个屋檐下"

vocabulary.definition: n. 混乱, 混淆, 无秩序；[计] 含混
vocabulary.context: The husband looked at his wife with confusion.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 丈夫困惑地看着妻子

vocabulary.definition: n. 事件, 事变, 小事；adj. 附带的, 易于发生的, 外来的, 入射的
vocabulary.context: This story is based on a real incident.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这个故事取材于真实事件

vocabulary.definition: adv. 然后, 后来
vocabulary.context: Afterward, they collected the leaves and replaced them on the roof together.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随后，他们把树叶收集起来，一起放在屋顶上

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 提出理由, 争论, 辩论；v.t. 主张, 辩论, 证明, 说服
vocabulary.context: They started arguing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们开始争论

vocabulary.definition: n. 须后水；修脸润肤露
vocabulary.context: "OK, hijo , now you put your fingers like this," said his grandfather, smelling of tobacco and aftershave.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "好吧，hijo，现在你把手指这样放，"他的祖父说道，身上散发着烟草和须后水的味道

vocabulary.definition: n. (南美的)肉馅卷饼
vocabulary.context: She guided him to the kitchen table and gave him a tall glass of milk and something that looked like an empanada .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她把他带到厨房的桌子旁，给了他一大杯牛奶和一些看起来像肉馅卷饼的东西

vocabulary.definition: n. <美>干毛巾布, 擦碟干布
vocabulary.context: A pile of tortillas lay warm under a dishtowel.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一堆玉米饼温暖地放在抹布下

vocabulary.definition: n. 西班牙加调料的口利左香肠
vocabulary.context: His mother was in the kitchen cooking papas and chorizo con huevos .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的母亲正在厨房里煮爸爸和香肠

vocabulary.definition: n. 以辣椒调味之一种墨西哥菜
vocabulary.context: "It's a little dusty," his mom said, serving his favorite enchiladas, "But I think it works.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "有点灰尘，"他妈妈一边说，一边端着他最喜欢的辣酱玉米饼馅，"但我认为它有用

vocabulary.definition: n. 读经者, 讲师
vocabulary.context: There would be a second collection for Saint Vincent de Paul, the lector announced.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 讲师宣布，圣文森特·德·保罗将有第二本诗集

vocabulary.definition: adj. 爱窥探的, 爱管闲事的
vocabulary.context: "You bad, snoopy dog," said the man, wagging his finger.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "你这个坏史努比狗，"那人摇着手指说道

vocabulary.definition: adj. 杂乱的, 紊乱的, 肮脏的
vocabulary.context: He hesitated on the porch until Roger began to scratch the door with a mussy paw.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他在门廊上犹豫不决，直到罗杰开始用脏兮兮的爪子刮门

vocabulary.definition: n. 洗衣盆
vocabulary.context: The happiest was when his grandfather Lupe placed the guitarron, which was nearly as huge as a washtub, in his arms.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 最开心的是祖父Lupe把几乎和洗衣盆一样大的吉他手放在怀里

vocabulary.definition: n. 柳条；adj. 柳条编的
vocabulary.context: He said a Hail Mary and sang, and when the wicker basket came his way, he stuck a hand reluctantly in his pocket and pulled out the twenty-dollar bill.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他念了一声万福玛利亚，唱了起来，当柳条篮子向他走来时，他不情愿地把手伸进口袋，掏出那张二十美元的钞票

vocabulary.definition: n. 泉, 源泉, 墨水缸, 一副铅字
vocabulary.context: For the fount of hope was gushing
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因为希望的源泉正在涌出

vocabulary.definition: n. 笑柄, 笑话；v.i. 讲笑话, 嘲笑, 开玩笑；v.t. 嘲笑
vocabulary.context: We have laugh'd at little jests;
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们曾因小笑话而笑过；

vocabulary.definition: n. 寒冷, 冷, 冷淡

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不久，神父、教务长和市长进来了，他们像熟石灰上的水一样冒着泡，发出嘶嘶声

vocabulary.definition: n. 一壶的份量
vocabulary.context: As for the beer, Neighbor Nicholas had none to spare, so I just borrowed a jugful of Neighbor Frederick, and it is as good as the other for certain and sure."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 至于啤酒，邻居尼古拉斯没有多余的，所以我就借了一壶邻居弗雷德里克的啤酒，肯定和另一瓶一样好。"

vocabulary.definition: adv. 在那里, 为何
vocabulary.context: He blew a turn or two over his wife, whereat she sneezed, and then sat up as good and as sound as ever.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他在妻子身上吹了一两圈，她打了个喷嚏，然后像以前一样健康地坐了起来

vocabulary.definition: n. 结果, 结局, (论证的)要点
vocabulary.context: So they bargained and bargained till the upshot of the matter was that they paid Master Jacob fifty dollars, and marched off with the goat as pleased as pleased could be.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 于是，他们讨价还价，直到事情的结果是，他们付给雅各布主人五十美元，然后高兴地带着山羊走了

vocabulary.definition: n. 再现
vocabulary.context: entered World War II, the flag made a national reappearance, with more homes displaying it than ever before.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 进入第二次世界大战后，国旗在全国范围内重新出现，悬挂国旗的家庭比以往任何时候都多

vocabulary.definition: adj. 非正式的, 非官方的；[化] 非法定的; 未入药典的
vocabulary.context: In the Queissers' hometown of Cleveland, Ohio, the Service Flag quickly became the unofficial symbol for parents with a child in the military.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在奎瑟夫妇的家乡俄亥俄州克利夫兰，军旗很快成为有孩子参军的父母的非官方象征

vocabulary.definition: adj. 成直角的；[化] 矩形的
vocabulary.context: The flag would have a white rectangular background with a wide red border and a blue star to represent a soldier.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 旗帜将具有白色矩形背景，带有宽红色边框和代表士兵的蓝色星星

vocabulary.definition: adj. 自制的, 国产的
vocabulary.context: The Queissers' homemade flag had two blue stars, one for Charles and one for Robert Jr.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Queissers 自制的旗帜上有两颗蓝星，一颗代表查尔斯，一颗代表小罗伯特

vocabulary.definition: n. 亲爱的人；adj. 亲爱的, 昂贵的, 严重的, 急迫的；interj. 啊；adv. 深爱地, 高价地
vocabulary.context: The dearest thing in all the world to a father and mother are their children."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对于父母来说，世界上最亲爱的就是他们的孩子。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 专利权, 许可证, 执照, 专利品, 素质；adj. 专利的, 特许的, 显著的, 新奇的；v.t. 取得...的专利权, 请准专利
vocabulary.context: Captain Queisser soon applied for a patent on his flag design, which was granted in early November of 1917.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 奎塞尔船长很快就他的旗帜设计申请了专利，该专利于 1917 年 11 月初获得批准

vocabulary.definition: n. 卷入, 牵连, 包含, 困窘；[经] 财政困难, 经济上的困窘
vocabulary.context: It wasn't until the country's involvement in the Middle East that this changed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 直到该国介入中东之后，这种情况才发生了改变

vocabulary.definition: n. 终极, 根本, 顶点, 基本原则；adj. 终极的, 根本的, 极限的, 最远的, 最后的, 最大的
vocabulary.context: The flag now had a different message: a member of this house has made the ultimate sacrifice with his or her life during the war.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 旗帜现在传达了不同的信息：这个家族的一名成员在战争期间做出了最终的牺牲

vocabulary.definition: adv. 些微地, 苗条地
vocabulary.context: The gold star is slightly smaller than the blue one underneath, so it appears that the gold star has a blue border.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 金星比下面的蓝色星稍小，因此金星看起来有蓝色边框

vocabulary.definition: n. 显着,异常
vocabulary.context: Congress recognized the remarkableness of the code talkers' achievements, despite societal discrimination against them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管社会对密码说话者存在歧视，但国会还是承认了密码说话者所取得的非凡成就

vocabulary.definition: n. 半履带
vocabulary.context: For instance, the word for "colonel" was translated to "silver eagle," "fighter plane" became "hummingbird," "minesweeper" became "beaver," "half-track" became "race track," and "pyrotechnic" became "fancy fire."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 例如，"上校"一词被翻译为"银鹰"，"战斗机"被翻译为"蜂鸟"，"扫雷机"被翻译为"海狸"，"半履带"被翻译为"赛道"，"烟火"被翻译为"花哨的火焰"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 烟火的, 令人眼花缭乱的, 夸大炫耀的
vocabulary.context: For instance, the word for "colonel" was translated to "silver eagle," "fighter plane" became "hummingbird," "minesweeper" became "beaver," "half-track" became "race track," and "pyrotechnic" became "fancy fire."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 例如，"上校"一词被翻译为"银鹰"，"战斗机"被翻译为"蜂鸟"，"扫雷机"被翻译为"海狸"，"半履带"被翻译为"赛道"，"烟火"被翻译为"花哨的火焰"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 电报发送的, 电报的, 简短的；[经] 电送的, 电报的
vocabulary.context: During World Wars I and II, the military needed a quick and reliable means of protecting its radio, telephone, and telegraphic messages from enemy intelligence.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在第一次世界大战和第二次世界大战期间，军队需要一种快速可靠的方法来保护其无线电、电话和电报信息免受敌方情报的侵害

vocabulary.definition: n. 说话的人, 饶舌者, 空谈者
vocabulary.context: Soldiers from other tribes, including the Cheyenne, Comanche, Cherokee, Osage, and Yankton Sioux also were enlisted to communicate as code talkers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 来自其他部落的士兵，包括夏延族、科曼奇族、切罗基族、奥塞奇族和扬克顿苏族，也被征召作为密码对话者进行交流

vocabulary.definition: n. 校订, 修正, 改样；v.t. 校订, 修正, 校正
vocabulary.context: Napoleon once said, "the secret of war lies in the communications." If he were around today, he might have revised it to "secure communications."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 拿破仑曾说过，"战争的秘密在于通讯"。如果他今天在的话，他可能会将其修改为"安全通信"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 社会的
vocabulary.context: Congress recognized the remarkableness of the code talkers' achievements, despite societal discrimination against them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管社会对密码说话者存在歧视，但国会还是承认了密码说话者所取得的非凡成就

vocabulary.definition: n. 陆军上校, 长官
vocabulary.context: For instance, the word for "colonel" was translated to "silver eagle," "fighter plane" became "hummingbird," "minesweeper" became "beaver," "half-track" became "race track," and "pyrotechnic" became "fancy fire."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 例如，"上校"一词被翻译为"银鹰"，"战斗机"被翻译为"蜂鸟"，"扫雷机"被翻译为"海狸"，"半履带"被翻译为"赛道"，"烟火"被翻译为"花哨的火焰"

vocabulary.definition: n. 力量, 武力, 势力, 影响力, 军队, 力, 效力；v.t. 强迫, 强夺, 推动, 提高；[计] 人工转移; 强制
vocabulary.context: Their languages were ideal for the task at hand and fortunately, a large number of American Indians had joined the armed forces.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们的语言非常适合当前的任务，幸运的是，大量美洲印第安人加入了武装部队

vocabulary.definition: n. 超声学；[医] 超声学
vocabulary.context: We used high-pitched sound waves called ultrasonics.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们使用称为超声波的高音调声波

vocabulary.definition: n. 精炼厂；[化] 精炼厂炼糖厂
vocabulary.context: It is used to inspect oil tanks at refineries, power plants, and seaports.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它用于检查炼油厂、发电厂和海港的油罐

vocabulary.definition: n. 反应者, 反应器, 反应堆, 电抗器；[化] 反应釜; 反应锅
vocabulary.context: CECIL crawls inside the dangerous reactor areas of nuclear power plants and submarines.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: CECIL 在核电站和潜艇的危险反应堆区域内爬行

vocabulary.definition: n. 海港, 港口城市
vocabulary.context: It is used to inspect oil tanks at refineries, power plants, and seaports.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它用于检查炼油厂、发电厂和海港的油罐

vocabulary.definition: adj. 中型的, 中等大小的
vocabulary.context: Five to eight medium-sized houses could fit into one of these tanks.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 其中一个水箱可容纳五到八间中型房屋

vocabulary.definition: n. 真空, 空间, 真空吸尘器；adj. 真空的, 产生真空的, 利用真空的；v.t. 用吸尘器打扫
vocabulary.context: Since OTIS would need to bring vacuum hoses and electrical cables to do the job, we decided to lower the robot in through the opening at the top of the tank.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由于奥的斯需要携带真空软管和电缆来完成这项工作，我们决定通过罐顶部的开口将机器人降低

vocabulary.definition: n. 滤波器, 过滤器, 滤光器, 过滤嘴, 去尘器；v.t. 过滤, 渗透, 走漏；v.i. 滤过, 渗入；[计] 过滤器, 筛选
vocabulary.context: The dirty oil goes up one vacuum hose to the top of the oil tank, where a special filter removes the dirt.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 脏油通过一根真空软管到达油箱顶部，在那里有一个特殊的过滤器去除污垢

vocabulary.definition: n. 检验, 检查, 视察；[医] 检查, 视察, 监督, 望诊
vocabulary.context: OTIS is short for Oil Tank Inspection System.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: OTIS 是油罐检查系统的缩写

vocabulary.definition: adj. 女家长的
vocabulary.context: This young male has lived in a herd of female elephants, called a matriarchal pack, all his life.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这头年轻的雄性大象一生都生活在一群被称为母系群体的雌象中

vocabulary.definition: n. 吵闹；粗暴
vocabulary.context: "They enforce a strict social hierarchy and keep underlings in line when hormones rage and rowdiness may erupt."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "他们执行严格的社会等级制度，并在荷尔蒙爆发和骚乱可能爆发时让下属保持一致。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 狂暴状态；adj. 狂暴状态的
vocabulary.context: Otherwise, he can enter a state of heightened aggression called musth (pronounced "must").
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 否则，他可能会进入一种高度攻击性的状态，称为"musth"（发音为"must"）

vocabulary.definition: n. 部下, 下手, 下属
vocabulary.context: "They enforce a strict social hierarchy and keep underlings in line when hormones rage and rowdiness may erupt."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "他们执行严格的社会等级制度，并在荷尔蒙爆发和骚乱可能爆发时让下属保持一致。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 调停者, 传递者, 基督；[医] 间介器, 传递器, 介质, 传递质介体
vocabulary.context: "Older males serve as mentors and mediators for younger ones," she says.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "年长的男性充当年轻男性的导师和调解人，"她说

vocabulary.definition: adv. (贬)侵略, 侵犯, 寻衅, (褒)敢作敢为, 有进取心, (武器)攻击性, 过分, 放肆
vocabulary.context: In the teen years, their bodies produce natural chemicals called hormones, which can cause them to behave aggressively.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在青少年时期，他们的身体会产生称为激素的天然化学物质，这会导致他们表现出攻击性

vocabulary.definition: n. 等级制度, 僧侣统治, 等级体系；[计] 分级结构; 分层结构; 新闻组, 新闻组分层
vocabulary.context: "This aggression is the beginning of a young elephant growing into a breeding male, who will find his place in a hierarchy of other male elephants," says Dr.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "这种攻击行为是幼象成长为繁殖雄性大象的开始，雄性大象将在其他雄性大象的等级制度中找到自己的位置，"博士说

vocabulary.definition: n. 侵犯, 侵略；[医] 攻击
vocabulary.context: "This aggression is the beginning of a young elephant growing into a breeding male, who will find his place in a hierarchy of other male elephants," says Dr.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "这种攻击行为是幼象成长为繁殖雄性大象的开始，雄性大象将在其他雄性大象的等级制度中找到自己的位置，"博士说

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 镇压, 使止住, 禁止, 抑制, 查禁；[法] 镇压, 平定, 禁止出版
vocabulary.context: When young males are in the presence of bulls, the hormones that trigger musth are suppressed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当年轻雄性与公牛在一起时，引发发情的激素就会受到抑制

vocabulary.definition: n. 叮, 刺痛, 刺激, 讽刺；v.t. 叮, 刺痛, 刺激, 使苦恼；v.i. 叮, 刺痛
vocabulary.context: It has a sting -
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它有刺--

vocabulary.definition: n. 掠夺者, 搞坏事情的人, 宠坏别人的人
vocabulary.context: In the Jurassic Park/Jurassic World movies, scientists bring back dinosaurs that have been extinct for at least 65 million years. (Spoiler alert: Bad idea.)
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在侏罗纪公园/侏罗纪世界电影中，科学家带回了已经灭绝至少 6500 万年的恐龙。 （剧透警告：坏主意。）

vocabulary.definition: adj. 极小的，极细微的
vocabulary.context: DNA is a special material inside every living thing that carries all the instructions for what it'll be like, including how it will look and what it can do (DNA is shaped kind of like a teeny-tiny spiral staircase, but it takes a very powerful, very specialized microscope to see it.)
vocabulary.contextTranslation: DNA 是每一种生物体内的一种特殊材料，它携带着关于它会是什么样子的所有指令，包括它的外观和它的功能（DNA 的形状有点像一个微小的螺旋楼梯，但它需要一个非常强大、非常专业的显微镜才能看到它。）

vocabulary.definition: adj. 保养得很好的
vocabulary.context: Researchers recently discovered something that looks kind of like DNA in a really well-preserved 125 million-year-old fossil of a peacock-sized dinosaur called Caudipteryx and in a 76 million-year-old duck-billed dinosaur called Hypacrosaurus .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 研究人员最近在保存完好的 1.25 亿年前孔雀大小的尾翼恐龙化石和 7600 万年前的亚冠龙鸭嘴恐龙化石中发现了一些看起来有点像 DNA 的东西

vocabulary.definition: adj. 胶粘的, 自作多情的；n. 胶粘物, 性格软弱的人
vocabulary.context: The mosquito had gotten stuck in gooey tree resin, which fossilized into hard amber.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 蚊子被困在粘糊糊的树脂中，树脂变成了坚硬的琥珀化石

vocabulary.definition: n. 混血儿, 杂种, 混合物；adj. 混合的, 杂种的, 混合语的；[计] NetWare的主机实用程序, 双重用户建立程序
vocabulary.context: To be honest, it wouldn't create a true woolly mammoth, but more of a hybrid woolly mammoth-Asian elephant or a "mammophant." But, if everything goes according to plan, the animal will look and act like a woolly mammoth.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 老实说，它不会创造出真正的猛犸象，而更像是猛犸象与亚洲象的杂交体或"猛犸象"。但是，如果一切按计划进行，这种动物的外观和行为都会像猛犸象

vocabulary.definition: n. 新纪元, 时代, 时期
vocabulary.context: Woolly mammoths - the shaggy, long-tusked relatives of today's elephants and the best-known of all the mammoths - first appeared about 300,000 years ago during the Pleistocene epoch, which included the Ice Age.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 长毛猛犸象是当今大象的毛茸茸、长牙的近亲，也是所有猛犸象中最著名的一种，首次出现于大约 30 万年前的更新世，其中包括冰河时代

vocabulary.definition: adj. 众所周知的, 著名的
vocabulary.context: Woolly mammoths - the shaggy, long-tusked relatives of today's elephants and the best-known of all the mammoths - first appeared about 300,000 years ago during the Pleistocene epoch, which included the Ice Age.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 长毛猛犸象是当今大象的毛茸茸、长牙的近亲，也是所有猛犸象中最著名的一种，首次出现于大约 30 万年前的更新世，其中包括冰河时代

vocabulary.definition: v. (使)降级, (使)退化
vocabulary.context: "All of these things will break down the DNA into smaller and more degraded pieces until, eventually, there is nothing left," biologist Beth Shapiro, an expert on ancient DNA, told Live Science .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "所有这些东西都会将 DNA 分解成更小、更降解的片段，直到最终什么都没有留下，"古代 DNA 专家、生物学家贝丝·夏皮罗 (Beth Shapiro) 告诉《Live Science》

vocabulary.definition: n. 臂章, 臂钏, 小海湾；[医] [缠]臂带(血压计)
vocabulary.context: There was nobody in the whole world like him, and this was why: around his wrist he wore an armlet that fitted as close as the skin.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 全世界没有人像他一样，这就是原因：他的手腕上戴着一个紧贴皮肤的臂章

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 昏聩, 溺爱
vocabulary.context: A while ago she had a wise bird on which she doted, for it knew everything that happened in the world, so that it could tell the princess whatever she wanted to know.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不久前，她宠爱了一只聪明的小鸟，因为它知道世界上发生的一切，所以它可以告诉公主任何她想知道的事情

vocabulary.definition: adj. 好心肠的
vocabulary.context: At this the North Wind grumbled and shook his head; but at last he said "yes," for he is a good-hearted fellow at the bottom, is the North Wind, though his ways are a trifle rough perhaps.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 听到这里，北风嘟哝着摇了摇头。但最后他说"是"，因为他是一个底层的好心人，就是北风，尽管他的方式也许有点粗暴

vocabulary.definition: n. 额发, 额毛, 销；v.t. 用销销住
vocabulary.context: But the faithful servant was ready for him; he caught him by the mane and forelock, and the Wild Black Horse had never had such a one to catch hold of him before.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但那忠实的仆人已经为他做好了准备；他抓住了他的鬃毛和额发，野黑马以前从未有过这样的人抓住过他

vocabulary.definition: adv. 舒适地, 整洁干净地, 紧密地
vocabulary.context: The faithful servant dug a hole in the bottom of this trench, and there he hid himself as snugly as a cricket in the crack in the kitchen floor.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 忠实的仆人在沟的底部挖了一个洞，然后他像蟋蟀一样紧紧地躲在厨房地板的裂缝里

vocabulary.definition: n. 卷线杆, 拉线棒
vocabulary.context: There he found a little tumbled-down hut, and within the hut sat an old, old woman with a distaff, spinning a lump of flax.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在那里，他发现了一座倒塌的小茅屋，茅屋里坐着一位老太婆，手里拿着一根棍子，正在纺一团亚麻

vocabulary.definition: n. 吵闹声, 叫嚷声, 混乱
vocabulary.context: Last of all came the North Wind, and dear, dear, what a hubbub he made outside of the door, stamping the dust off of his feet before he came into the house.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 最后刮来的是北风，亲爱的，亲爱的，他在进屋之前，在门外弄得多么喧闹，跺脚上的灰尘

vocabulary.definition: adj. 悲伤的, 悲哀的
vocabulary.context: "Alas, master," said the faithful servant, "that is a woeful thing for me, for the one and only way to take the armlet off of my wrist is to cut my hand from off my body."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "唉，主人，"忠实的仆人说，"这对我来说是一件悲惨的事情，因为从我手腕上取下臂章的唯一方法就是把我的手从我的身体上割下来。"

vocabulary.definition: adv. 直接地, 立刻地；adj. 直线行进的, 顺序直叙的, 直通的
vocabulary.context: So the princess told the king what the Wise Bird had bidden her to say, and the king went straightway to the faithful servant.

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 集聚, 集中, 施行中央集权；v.i. 集中

vocabulary.context: Still, the Austrian-born Dutch woman, knighted by the governments of Germany and the Netherlands, recipient of a medal from Yad Vashem Holocaust Museum, always insisted she had done nothing extraordinary.

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 预见, 预知
