vocabulary.context: On her website she wrote it was her greatest sorrow that she and the others had been unable to save Anne, but she was pleased they'd been able to give the young woman two more years of life, and in that period Gies noted, Anne had written the diary with her message of tolerance and understanding.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她在她的网站上写道，她和其他人无法拯救安妮是她最大的悲伤，但她很高兴他们能够让这位年轻女子多活两年，吉斯指出，在那段时期，安妮在日记中传达了宽容和理解的信息

vocabulary.definition: n. 记录片；adj. 文件的
vocabulary.context: On the very sad day that year that he learned both his daughters had died in a camp, Otto Frank later explained in a documentary, Gies delivered him what he called a miracle.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 奥托·弗兰克后来在一部纪录片中解释说，在那一年非常悲伤的一天，他得知自己的两个女儿都死在了集中营里，吉斯为他带来了他所谓的奇迹

vocabulary.definition: n. 笔记, 记录, 注解, 票据, 符号, 显要, 注重, 便笺, 照会；v.t. 记录, 注解, 注意
vocabulary.context: Providing refuge to Jews, she noted later, carried a punishment of at least six months in a concentration camp.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她后来指出，向犹太人提供庇护会被处以至少在集中营中监禁六个月的惩罚

vocabulary.definition: n. 土人的腰布, 短裤
vocabulary.context: The basic dress for men was the breechclout, a length of deerskin looped over a belt in back and in front.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 男士的基本服装是马裤，一段鹿皮，前后绕着一条腰带

vocabulary.definition: n. 熊皮, 熊皮衣
vocabulary.context: Deerskin leggings and fur capes made from deer, beaver, otter, and bearskins gave protection during the colder seasons, and deerskin moccasins were worn on the feet.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由鹿、海狸、水獭和熊皮制成的鹿皮紧身裤和毛皮斗篷在寒冷的季节提供保护，脚上穿鹿皮莫卡辛鞋

vocabulary.definition: n. 聚集的人群, 出席者, 产量；[化] 输出; 产额
vocabulary.context: As the Thanksgiving feast began, the Pilgrims were overwhelmed at the large turnout of ninety relatives that Squanto and Samoset brought with them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当感恩节盛宴开始时，朝圣者们对斯匡托和萨莫塞特带来的九十名亲戚的大批出席感到不知所措

vocabulary.definition: n. 奴隶商人, 奴隶贩卖船, 口水；v.i. 垂涎, 淌口水, 奉承；v.t. 淌口水弄脏
vocabulary.context: Later Squanto was captured by a British slaver who raided the village and sold Squanto to the Spanish in the Caribbean Islands.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 后来斯匡托被一名英国奴隶贩子俘获，他袭击了该村庄并将斯匡托卖给了加勒比群岛的西班牙人

vocabulary.definition: n. 鹿皮, 鹿皮制衣服
vocabulary.context: The basic dress for men was the breechclout, a length of deerskin looped over a belt in back and in front.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 男士的基本服装是马裤，一段鹿皮，前后绕着一条腰带

vocabulary.definition: n. 绑腿, 裹腿
vocabulary.context: Deerskin leggings and fur capes made from deer, beaver, otter, and bearskins gave protection during the colder seasons, and deerskin moccasins were worn on the feet.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由鹿、海狸、水獭和熊皮制成的鹿皮紧身裤和毛皮斗篷在寒冷的季节提供保护，脚上穿鹿皮莫卡辛鞋

vocabulary.definition: n. 岬, 海角, 披肩, 斗蓬
vocabulary.context: Deerskin leggings and fur capes made from deer, beaver, otter, and bearskins gave protection during the colder seasons, and deerskin moccasins were worn on the feet.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由鹿、海狸、水獭和熊皮制成的鹿皮紧身裤和毛皮斗篷在寒冷的季节提供保护，脚上穿鹿皮莫卡辛鞋

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 淹没, 受打击, 制服, 压倒, 使不知所措；[法] 打翻, 倾覆, 覆盖
vocabulary.context: As the Thanksgiving feast began, the Pilgrims were overwhelmed at the large turnout of ninety relatives that Squanto and Samoset brought with them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当感恩节盛宴开始时，朝圣者们对斯匡托和萨莫塞特带来的九十名亲戚的大批出席感到不知所措

vocabulary.definition: adj. 共栖的, 共生的；[医] 共生的
vocabulary.context: Symbiotic is when two living things live together and change how the other one lives.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 共生是指两种生物共同生活并改变另一种生物的生活方式

vocabulary.definition: adj. 对各方都有益的; 双赢的
vocabulary.context: It's win-win for these two.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这对两者来说是双赢的

vocabulary.definition: n. 瞪羚
vocabulary.context: Lions run down a gazelle!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 狮子追倒了羚羊！

vocabulary.definition: adj. 渴望的, 痒的, 生疥疮的
vocabulary.context: They may make the whale's skin a little itchy, but they do not hurt it.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们可能会让鲸鱼的皮肤有点痒，但不会伤害它

vocabulary.definition: n. 蚊子；[医] 蚊
vocabulary.context: Have you ever slapped a mosquito?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你打过蚊子吗？

vocabulary.definition: n. 寄生生物, 寄生虫, 食客；[医] 寄生物; 寄生胎
vocabulary.context: Those are parasites.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那些是寄生虫

vocabulary.definition: n. 强盗, 盗贼
vocabulary.context: These little robbers do not want to kill their host.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些小强盗并不想杀死他们的主人

vocabulary.definition: n. 滴答声, 一瞬间, 壁虱, 褥套, 信用, 赊欠；v.i. 滴答响, 活动；v.t. 滴答地记录, 标记号于
vocabulary.context: Birds will live on the backs of zebras and eat the ticks that are drinking the zebra's blood.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 鸟类会生活在斑马的背上，并吃掉喝斑马血的蜱虫

vocabulary.definition: n. 情形, 情况, 箱, 容器, 事实, 病例, 案例, 框子；v.t. 装箱, 包盖
vocabulary.context: In some of these cases, one animal could not live without the other.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在其中一些情况下，一只动物离开另一只动物就无法生存

vocabulary.definition: n. 区别, 分化, 变异；[医] 鉴别, 区别, 分化[作用], 微分法
vocabulary.context: When a stem cell changes into a specific cell, we call it differentiation.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当干细胞转变为特定细胞时，我们称之为分化

vocabulary.definition: v. 区别, 区分
vocabulary.context: Stem cells are important to living things because they have not differentiated.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 干细胞对生物很重要，因为它们尚未分化

vocabulary.definition: n. 书桌, 办公桌, 工作台
vocabulary.context: The restaurants may have a lot of tables and chairs, while the schools have desks and books.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 餐馆可能有很多桌椅，而学校则有课桌和书籍

vocabulary.definition: n. 洗衣店, 洗好的衣服, 洗涤；[机] 洗衣作, 洗衣店, 洗衣房
vocabulary.context: Maybe one night your mom makes dinner, your dad does the laundry, and you have to make your bed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 也许有一天晚上，你妈妈做晚饭，你爸爸洗衣服，而你必须整理床铺

vocabulary.definition: n. 基因；[化] 基因(遗传因子)
vocabulary.context: In living things, these rules are called genes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在生物中，这些规则被称为基因

vocabulary.definition: n. 种子, 籽, 萌芽, 子孙, 精液；v.t. 在...播种, 催...发育, 脱...籽；v.i. 结实, 播种
vocabulary.context: Seeds will turn into a tree or a flower.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 种子会变成一棵树或一朵花

vocabulary.definition: n. 分, 分开, 除法, 部门(如部、处、系等), 师；[计] 部分
vocabulary.context: A division of labor is when everyone does a different job.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 分工是指每个人都从事不同的工作

vocabulary.definition: n. 商店, 工厂, 车间；v.i. 购物, 到处寻找；v.t. 选购
vocabulary.context: All the homes, schools, shops, and restaurants look different from the street.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 所有的住宅、学校、商店和餐馆与街道看起来都不一样

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有责任的, 负责的, 责任重大的；[法] 应负责任的, 有责任的, 能履行责任的
vocabulary.context: Today we learned that living things are made up of many different kinds of cells, and that each cell is responsible for doing something different.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 今天我们了解到，生物是由许多不同种类的细胞组成的，每个细胞负责做不同的事情

vocabulary.definition: adv. 便宜地
vocabulary.context: A factory-owner's job was to make as much stuff as quickly and cheaply as possible and then sell it as quickly and for as much money as possible.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 工厂主的工作是尽可能快、尽可能便宜地制造尽可能多的东西，然后尽快、尽可能多地卖掉它

vocabulary.definition: adj. 公有的, 公社的；[法] 公共的, 自治体的, 巴黎公社的
vocabulary.context: Before minimum wage came along, giving families enough to feed and house themselves, people often lived in communal homes, which were dirty and cold and might have many families living in them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在最低工资出现之前，为家庭提供足够的食物和住房，人们通常住在公共住宅中，这些住宅又脏又冷，可能有很多家庭住在里面

vocabulary.definition: n. 尿；adj. 不新鲜的, 陈腐的, 疲惫的, 陈旧的；v.t. 使变旧, 走味；v.i. 变陈旧, 走味, 失时效, 撒尿
vocabulary.context: Just as you and your mother are sitting down to stale bread and thin soup, your brother BURSTS through the door!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 正当你和你的母亲坐下来吃不新鲜的面包和稀汤时，你的兄弟冲破了门！

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 激动, 感到刺痛, 抖动；v.t. 使感刺痛；n. 刺痛, 震颤, 耳鸣
vocabulary.context: We will not go back to work until they give us better pay!" At the thought of not working, your fingers start to tingle...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在他们给我们更好的工资之前我们不会回去工作！"一想到不工作，你的手指就开始发麻......

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不安全的, 不安稳的, 危险的；[经] 不安全
vocabulary.context: Child labor is when young children work in places that are unsafe and are paid less than adults.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 童工是指幼儿在不安全的地方工作，且工资低于成人

vocabulary.definition: adv. 法律上, 合法地；[法] 法律上, 合法地, 法定地
vocabulary.context: Minimum wage is the lowest amount of money a boss can legally pay each employee, but this wasn't a law until over a hundred years after the first factories.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 最低工资是老板可以合法支付给每位员工的最低工资，但这直到第一家工厂成立一百多年后才成为法律

vocabulary.definition: n. 改革, 改正, 改造；v.t. 改革, 改过, 革新, 重整；v.i. 革新, 改过
vocabulary.context: It took many years of protest and reform before this became a law.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 经过多年的抗议和改革，这才成为法律

vocabulary.definition: adj. 工业的, 供工业用的, 工业高度发展的, 产业的；n. 工业工人, 工业股票
vocabulary.context: Now imagine you're ten years old after the Industrial Revolution in the late 1800's with factories booming all around you.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 现在想象一下，1800 年代末工业革命结束后，您已经十岁了，周围的工厂正在蓬勃发展

vocabulary.definition: n. 异端, 异教；[法] 异端邪说, 异教, 信奉异教
vocabulary.context: She was found guilty of heresy (largely because she claimed to have spoken with angels, which was against church law) and sentenced to be burned at the stake.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她被判犯有异端罪（主要是因为她声称与天使交谈，这违反了教会法）并被判处在火刑柱上烧死

vocabulary.definition: adv. 残忍地, 残酷地, 极
vocabulary.context: She was refused a lawyer and was treated cruelly in prison.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她被拒绝聘请律师，并在监狱中受到残酷对待

vocabulary.definition: n. 无经验, 不熟练
vocabulary.context: She was but an inexperienced teenager, leading an army full of battle-hardened men.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她只是一个毫无经验的少年，领导着一支由身经百战的男人组成的军队

vocabulary.definition: n. 青鱼, 鲱
vocabulary.context: But the next year, when Joan correctly predicted a great French defeat outside Orleans (the Battle of the Herrings), Baudricourt was willing to listen.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但第二年，当贞德正确地预测了法国在奥尔良之外的惨败（鲱鱼之战）时，鲍德里古愿意倾听

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 环绕, 围绕, 包围
vocabulary.context: The English forts built to encircle the city were taken and the siege ended in an astonishing eight days.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为包围城市而建造的英国堡垒被占领，围攻在令人惊讶的八天内结束

vocabulary.definition: n. 包围, 围攻, 再三的努力；v.t. 包围, 围攻
vocabulary.context: Astonished, King Charles agreed to let Joan go to Orleans, where French forces were under siege.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 查尔斯国王感到惊讶，同意让琼前往法国军队围困的奥尔良

vocabulary.definition: n. 侵略者；[化] 侵入物
vocabulary.context: Joan convinced King Charles VII of her sincerity and of her calling to help France defend itself against the English invaders.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 贞德说服了查理七世国王她的诚意和她帮助法国抵御英国侵略者的呼吁

vocabulary.definition: n. 诚实, 真实, 诚心诚意
vocabulary.context: Joan convinced King Charles VII of her sincerity and of her calling to help France defend itself against the English invaders.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 贞德说服了查理七世国王她的诚意和她帮助法国抵御英国侵略者的呼吁

vocabulary.definition: n. 进步, 发展, 前进；v.i. 进步, 进行
vocabulary.context: The French progress bogged down as the English dug in.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由于英国人的顽强抵抗，法国人的进步陷入了困境

vocabulary.definition: n. [陶瓷] 青花
vocabulary.context: Remember when I took the laces out of my blue-and-white sneakers and gave them to you?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 还记得我把蓝白运动鞋的鞋带取下来送给你吗？

vocabulary.definition: n. 破伤风；[医] 破伤风; 强直
vocabulary.context: I hope when you go for your checkup you need a tetanus shot.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我希望您去检查时需要注射破伤风疫苗

vocabulary.definition: n. 圣代冰淇淋
vocabulary.context: My father said I could call someone to go with us for a ride and hot-fudge sundaes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我父亲说我可以叫人和我们一起去兜风，吃热软糖圣代

vocabulary.definition: n. 扁桃体；[医] 扁桃体
vocabulary.context: Alfie is having his tonsils out tomorrow.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 阿尔菲明天要切除扁桃体

vocabulary.definition: n. 园领长袖运动衫
vocabulary.context: And give back the Disneyland sweatshirt I said you could wear.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 把我说你可以穿的迪士尼乐园运动衫还给我

vocabulary.definition: n. 洞, 空穴, 腔；[化] 空穴
vocabulary.context: I hope when you go to the dentist he finds twenty cavities.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我希望当你去看牙医时他会发现二十个蛀牙

vocabulary.definition: v. 编织, 结合
vocabulary.context: Why don't you forget about baseball and learn something nice like knitting?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你为什么不忘记棒球并学习一些不错的东西，比如编织呢？

vocabulary.definition: n. 条理, 斑纹, 倾向；v.t. 加条纹；v.i. 变成条纹, 飞跑
vocabulary.context: Sorry about your 12-game losing streak.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对你的12连败感到抱歉

vocabulary.definition: n. 踢, 反冲, 后座力, 凹底；v.i. 踢, 反抗, 反冲；v.t. 踢, 反冲
vocabulary.context: I wasn't kicking exactly.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我没有完全踢

vocabulary.definition: n. 声音渐强
vocabulary.context: the crescendo then whispering - this
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 渐强然后窃窃私语 - 这

vocabulary.definition: n. 吸, 吸入, 吸上, 吸引, 吸力；[化] 吸气; 吸入
vocabulary.context: suctioned your ear
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 吸你的耳朵

vocabulary.definition: n. 当当声, 铿锵声；v.i. 发出当当声, 发铿锵声；v.t. 使发铿锵声
vocabulary.context: to the beads clanging kiss
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 到珠子铿锵的吻

vocabulary.definition: n. 车道
vocabulary.context: on sidewalks, blacktopped driveways,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在人行道、柏油路车道上，

vocabulary.definition: n. 层, 产卵鸡, 放置者；v.t. 分层堆积, 压植；[计] 层
vocabulary.context: through the hair's woven layers
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 穿过头发的编织层

vocabulary.definition: n. 电视；[电] 电视
vocabulary.context: a new view of the television
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 电视的新观点

vocabulary.definition: n. 减轻, 解除, 救济, 安慰, 调剂, 浮雕, 换班, (地势的)起伏；[医] 缓减, 减轻, 浮雕(绘画中)
vocabulary.context: relief was turning your head
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 解脱让你转过头

vocabulary.definition: n. 运动, 动作, 运转, 移动, 倾向, 变化, 活动, 乐章；[医] 运动
vocabulary.context: music celebrating the movement of you
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 庆祝你的动作的音乐

vocabulary.definition: n. 善行, 好处, 利益；adj. 好的, 优良的, 上等的, 愉快的, 有益的, 好心的, 慈善的, 虔诚的
vocabulary.context: but nothing was better than
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但没有什么比

vocabulary.definition: adj. 双焦的；[医] 双焦点的
vocabulary.context: The border is the line in new bifocals: below, small things get bigger; above, nothing changes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 边界是新双光眼镜的界线：下方，小东西变大；下方，小东西变大；下面，小东西变大；下面，小东西变大；下面，小东西变大；上面，没有任何变化

vocabulary.definition: n. 检查站；[计] 检查点
vocabulary.context: The border has become Checkpoint Chale.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 边境已成为查尔检查站

vocabulary.definition: n. 握手
vocabulary.context: The border is a handshake that becomes a squeezing contest.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 边界是一次握手，变成了一场挤压竞赛

vocabulary.definition: n. 打火石, 燧石, 极硬的东西；[化] 燧石
vocabulary.context: The border is where flint first met steel, starting a century of fires.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 边境是燧石第一次与钢铁相遇的地方，开启了一个世纪的大火

vocabulary.definition: n. 小丑, 乡下人
vocabulary.context: The border is "NoNo" The Clown, who can't make anyone laugh.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 边界是"NoNo"小丑，他不能让任何人发笑

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不注意地, 粗心地
vocabulary.context: The border is a beautiful piece of paper folded carelessly in half.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 边框是一张漂亮的纸，不小心对折了

vocabulary.definition: n. 竞赛, 争论；v.t. 竞争, 争取, 争辩；v.i. 竞争
vocabulary.context: The border is a handshake that becomes a squeezing contest.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 边界是一次握手，变成了一场挤压竞赛

vocabulary.definition: n. 商标, 牌子, 烙印；v.t. 打烙印于
vocabulary.context: The border is a brand, the "Double-X" of barbed wire scarred into the skin of so many.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 边界是一个品牌，"Double-X"铁丝网在许多人的皮肤上留下了疤痕

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 促进, 晋升, 创办, 推销；[经] 促进, 推广, 推销
vocabulary.context: The border is a locked door that has been promoted.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 边界是一扇被提升的锁着的门

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可满足的
vocabulary.context: But there was one Elephant-a new Elephant-an Elephant's Child-who was full of 'satiable curtiosity, and that means he asked ever so many questions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但是有一头大象--一头新大象--大象的孩子--充满了"满足的好奇心"，这意味着他问了很多问题

vocabulary.definition: adj. 装甲的
vocabulary.context: ...devote ourselves to a little high tension, because if we do not, it is my impression that yonder self-propelling man-of-war with the armour-plated upper deck" (and by this, O Best Beloved, he meant the Crocodile), "will permanently vitiate your future career."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...让我们自己保持一点高度紧张，因为如果我们不这样做，我的印象是，那边那艘带有装甲上层甲板的自动推进战舰"（O Best Beloved，他指的是鳄鱼号），"将永远损害你未来的职业生涯。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 带黑色的
vocabulary.context: He had only a blackish, bulgy nose, as big as a boot, that he could wriggle about from side to side; but he couldn't pick up things with it.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他只有一个黑色的、凸出的鼻子，像靴子一样大，可以左右蠕动；但他无法用它捡起东西

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 展开, 解开；v.i. 展开, 伸开
vocabulary.context: Then the Bi-Coloured-Python-Rock-Snake uncoiled himself very quickly from the rock, and spanked the Elephant's Child with his scalesome, flailsome tail.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后，双色巨蟒岩蛇很快从岩石上解开，用它那鳞片状、连枷状的尾巴打了象子的屁股

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使变质, 污染, 使堕落, 败坏, 使失效；[法] 败坏, 污损, 污染
vocabulary.context: ...man-of-war with the armour-plated upper deck" (and by this, O Best Beloved, he meant the Crocodile), "will permanently vitiate your future career."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...配备装甲上层甲板的战舰"（O Best Beloved，他指的是鳄鱼），"将永远损害你未来的职业生涯。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 荆棘
vocabulary.context: By and by, when that was finished, he came upon Kolokolo Bird sitting in the middle of a wait-a-bit thorn-bush, and he said, "My father has spanked me, and my mother has spanked me; all my aunts and uncles have spanked me for my 'satiable curtiosity; and still I want to know what the Crocodile has for dinner!"
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不久，当这一切完成时，他遇到了坐在荆棘丛中间的科洛科洛鸟，他说："我的父亲打了我的屁股，我的母亲打了我的屁股；我所有的阿姨和叔叔都因为我的'满足的好奇心'而打了我的屁股；但我仍然想知道鳄鱼晚餐吃什么！"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 麝香的, 产生麝香的, 麝香似的
vocabulary.context: Then the Elephant's Child put his head down close to the Crocodile's musky, tusky mouth, and the Crocodile caught him by his little nose, which up to that very week, day, hour, and minute, had been no bigger than a boot, though much more useful.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后，象的孩子把头低到鳄鱼那充满麝香味的、长着獠牙的嘴巴附近，鳄鱼抓住了他的小鼻子，直到那一周、一天、一小时、一分钟，它还没有比靴子大，尽管更有用

vocabulary.definition: adj. 一滴一滴流的
vocabulary.context: "It is," said the Elephant's Child, and before he thought what he was doing he schlooped up a schloop of mud from the banks of the great grey-green, greasy Limpopo, and slapped it on his head, where it made a cool schloopy-sloshy mud-cap all trickly behind his ears.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "是的，"小象的孩子说，还没等他想到自己在做什么，他就从灰绿色、油腻的林波波河岸上舀起一团泥巴，拍在他的头上，在他的耳后形成了一个凉爽的、泥泞的泥帽

vocabulary.definition: n. 有带的宽大长外套
vocabulary.context: Then the Bi-Coloured-Python-Rock-Snake scuffled down from the bank and said, "My young friend, if you do not now, immediately and instantly, pull as hard as ever you can, it is my opinion that your acquaintance in the large-pattern leather ulster" (and by this he meant the Crocodile) "will jerk you into yonder limpid stream before you can say Jack Robinson."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后，双色巨蟒岩石蛇从岸边拖下来，说道："我年轻的朋友，如果你现在不立即、立即尽你所能地用力拉，我认为你对大图案皮革乌尔斯特的熟识"（他指的是鳄鱼）"会在你说出杰克·罗宾逊之前把你拉到那边清澈的溪流中。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有獠牙的, 有长牙的
vocabulary.context: Then the Elephant's Child put his head down close to the Crocodile's musky, tusky mouth, and the Crocodile caught him by his little nose, which up to that very week, day, hour, and minute, had been no bigger than a boot, though much more useful.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后，象的孩子把头低到鳄鱼那充满麝香味的、长着獠牙的嘴巴附近，鳄鱼抓住了他的小鼻子，直到那一周、一天、一小时、一分钟，它还没有比靴子大，尽管更有用

vocabulary.context: The COVID-19 pandemic put a crimp into Najiah's packed schedule of competitions as well as her plans to win that championship in 2020.

vocabulary.context: But from her earliest days, Najiah has been following her father Andrew Knight behind the chutes as he prepared for bull riding events and begging him to "put me on!"
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但从她很小的时候起，纳吉亚就一直跟随她的父亲安德鲁·奈特在滑道后面，为他准备骑牛活动，并恳求他"让我上场！"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 勇敢的, 刚毅的
vocabulary.context: For though Gobaly was stout-hearted, he didn't like to be reminded that he was "town's poor," and that Christmas was nothing to him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管戈巴利心地坚强，但他不喜欢别人提醒他他是"镇上的穷人"，圣诞节对他来说根本不算什么

vocabulary.definition: n. 弃儿, 拾来的孩儿
vocabulary.context: Pynchum called him; and he had come to her in a basket - in other words, Methuselah was a foundling.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 品钦打电话给他；他是装在篮子里来到她身边的--换句话说，玛土撒拉是一个弃儿

vocabulary.definition: adv. 优柔寡断地
vocabulary.context: He stood with his hands thrust into his trousers pockets, gazing irresolutely at the carpet.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他站着，双手插在裤兜里，犹豫不决地盯着地毯

vocabulary.definition: n. 跛, 瘸, 残废；[医] 跛, 跛行
vocabulary.context: Then he asked Methuselah about his lameness and the pain in his side, and said he ought to be sent to a certain hospital in New York, where he might be cured.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后他向玛土撒拉询问他的跛行和肋部疼痛的情况，并说他应该被送往纽约的某家医院，在那里他可能会被治愈

vocabulary.definition: n. 涂敷药；[化] 搽剂
vocabulary.context: Gobaly found it hard to decide whether the bone was broken or only out of place, but he made a sort of a splint, such as he had seen the doctor use upon the puppy's leg, and then wound soft cloths, wet with liniment, about it, and the dog certainly seemed relieved, and licked Gobaly's hand, and looked at him with grateful eyes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 戈巴利发现很难确定骨头是断了还是只是位置不合适，但他做了一种夹板，就像他看到医生在小狗的腿上使用的那样，然后用沾有搽剂的软布缠绕在它周围，狗显然似乎松了一口气，舔了舔戈巴利的手，用感激的眼神看着他

vocabulary.definition: n. 小狗, 狗儿(对狗的爱称)
vocabulary.context: Gobaly was at his side in a moment, patting his shaggy black head, calling him "poor doggie" and "good doggie," and trying to discover how badly he was hurt.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 戈巴利立刻就到了他身边，拍着他毛茸茸的黑头，称他为"可怜的小狗"和"好小狗"，并试图发现他伤得有多严重

vocabulary.definition: n. 壁炉
vocabulary.context: Pynchum piled great logs upon the fire-place, till there was such a roaring fire as had not been seen there for many a long day; and he told Joe Golightly and Gobaly to go down cellar and bring up as many apples as they wanted to, and he found the key of the closet where the bag of nuts was kept!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 彭丘姆在壁炉上堆起了巨大的木头，直到火焰熊熊燃烧，这是许多天以来从未见过的。他告诉乔·戈莱特利和戈巴利去地窖，想带多少苹果就带多少苹果，然后他找到了存放那袋坚果的壁橱的钥匙！

vocabulary.definition: adv. 嘲笑地, 轻蔑地
vocabulary.context: Pynchum's hearing that he wanted to be a doctor when he grew up, and she had said, sneeringly, that "town's poor weren't very likely to get a chance to learn to be doctors."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 平丘姆听说他长大后想成为一名医生，她嘲笑地说，"镇上的穷人不太可能有机会学习成为医生。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 雄火鸡
vocabulary.context: Gobaly had also successfully treated a kitten with a sprained ankle - to say nothing of one whose tail the gobbler had nipped off.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 戈巴利还成功治疗了一只脚踝扭伤的小猫--更不用说尾巴被贪吃者咬掉的小猫了

vocabulary.definition: n. 贮木场
vocabulary.context: Pynchum kept the poor-farm, and Gobaly was "town's poor." The boys sometimes called him that, when he went to coast on Three-Pine Hill or to see the skating on the mill-pond; and sometimes, too, they made fun of his clothes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 平丘姆（Pynchum）保留着贫困农场，戈巴利（Gobaly）是"镇上的穷人"。当他去三松山海岸或看磨坊池塘滑冰时，男孩们有时会这么叫他。有时，他们也会取笑他的衣服

vocabulary.definition: n. 偏见( bias的名词复数 ); 偏爱; 特殊能力; 斜纹；v. 使倾向于( bias的第三人称单数 )
vocabulary.context: It is a thought problem known as "the trolley problem." Tiffany Sun, 17, used it to explore biases in people against certain types of appearance, of apparent income or of disability.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是一个被称为"电车难题"的思想问题。 17 岁的蒂芙尼·孙 (Tiffany Sun) 用它来探索人们对某些类型的外表、表面收入或残疾的偏见

vocabulary.definition: n. 海岸, 滑坡；v. 沿海岸而行
vocabulary.context: The dinosaurs were destroyed 66 million years ago when an asteroid hit the earth just off the coast of what is now Mexico.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 6600万年前，当一颗小行星撞击现在墨西哥海岸附近的地球时，恐龙被毁灭了

vocabulary.definition: n. 上午中段时间；上午十点左右；adj. 发生在上午中段时间的；上午10时左右的；与上午中段时间有关的
vocabulary.context: We flew to Noorvik mid-morning on Monday, January 25, a 10-seat plane - full of state dignitaries.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1 月 25 日星期一上午，我们乘坐一架 10 座飞机飞往诺尔维克，机上满是国家政要

vocabulary.definition: n. 门廊
vocabulary.context: We arrived at the school to see the entire student body out on the portico of the school, applauding the arrival of the census to Noorvik (wouldn't it be great if every city in the US greeted census workers with such enthusiasm?).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们到达学校后，看到全体学生站在学校的门廊上，为诺维克人口普查的到来鼓掌（如果美国每个城市都以这样的热情迎接人口普查工作人员，那不是很好吗？）

vocabulary.definition: adj. 芳香的, 温和的, 止痛的；[化] 香脂气味的
vocabulary.context: The temperature at landing was a balmy 7 ° F.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 着陆时的温度为 7°F，气候宜人

vocabulary.definition: n. 拥挤, 充血；[计] 拥挤, 拥塞
vocabulary.context: My musher was a 12-year old student, who, after we moved out of the congestion of the airport, stopped and allowed me to mush the team for a bit of time.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我的拉雪橇者是一名 12 岁的学生，在我们离开拥挤的机场后，他停下来并允许我拉雪橇一段时间

vocabulary.definition: n. 高贵的人, 高官, 高僧, 要人
vocabulary.context: We flew to Noorvik mid-morning on Monday, January 25, a 10-seat plane - full of state dignitaries.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1 月 25 日星期一上午，我们乘坐一架 10 座飞机飞往诺尔维克，机上满是国家政要

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 列举, 计算, 枚举, 数；[法] 举出, 列举, 枚举
vocabulary.context: At 1 p.m., I rode with the mayor of Noorvik on an ATV to visit the very first household to be enumerated in the 2010 Census.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 下午1点，我和Noorvik市长一起乘坐全地形车，拜访了2010年人口普查中第一批被统计的家庭

vocabulary.definition: v. 拍手喝彩, 称赞, 赞同
vocabulary.context: We arrived at the school to see the entire student body out on the portico of the school, applauding the arrival of the census to Noorvik (wouldn't it be great if every city in the US greeted census workers with such enthusiasm?).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们到达学校后，看到全体学生站在学校的门廊上，为诺维克人口普查的到来鼓掌（如果美国每个城市都以这样的热情迎接人口普查工作人员，那不是很好吗？）

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 集合, 收集, 装配；v.i. 集合；[计] 汇编
vocabulary.context: I met the elders of the village, who were assembled in the lnupiat culture room, now used to instruct the children in their native language.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我遇到了村里的长辈，他们聚集在努皮亚特文化室，现在用来用母语指导孩子们

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 陪伴, 伴随, 补充, 为...伴奏；v.i. 伴奏, 伴唱
vocabulary.context: I also participated in a few satellite uplink interviews with various media, accompanied by a 12th grade student who talked about how the census fits into Noorvik's future.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我还参加了一些多家媒体的卫星上行采访，陪同的还有一名 12 年级学生，他谈到了人口普查如何适应诺维克的未来

vocabulary.definition: n. [鱼]罗非鱼
vocabulary.context: Fish such as tilapia can be raised this way year-round, and plants such as tomatoes, strawberries, lettuce, peppers, and celery can all be grown in nutrient-rich water.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 罗非鱼等鱼类可以全年以这种方式饲养，西红柿、草莓、生菜、辣椒和芹菜等植物都可以在营养丰富的水中生长

vocabulary.definition: n. 增稠器, 增稠剂；[化] 浓缩机; 纸浆浓缩机; 增稠剂; 增稠器
vocabulary.context: Carrageenan, which comes from red seaweed, is used as a thickener in many foods, including ice cream.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 来自红海藻的卡拉胶在许多食品中用作增稠剂，包括冰淇淋

vocabulary.definition: adv. 垂直地
vocabulary.context: It's called vertical farming because the plant containers can be stacked up in columns, or grown vertically.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这被称为垂直农业，因为植物容器可以成列堆叠，或垂直种植

vocabulary.definition: n. 公顷；[经] 公顷
vocabulary.context: A vertical farm the size of a supermarket could produce the same amount of food as 700 acres (280 hectares) of land.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一个超市大小的垂直农场可以生产与 700 英亩（280 公顷）土地相同数量的食物

vocabulary.definition: n. 芹菜；[医] 芹菜, 糖蒿
vocabulary.context: Fish such as tilapia can be raised this way year-round, and plants such as tomatoes, strawberries, lettuce, peppers, and celery can all be grown in nutrient-rich water.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 罗非鱼等鱼类可以全年以这种方式饲养，西红柿、草莓、生菜、辣椒和芹菜等植物都可以在营养丰富的水中生长

vocabulary.definition: n. 寿司（生鱼片冷饭团）
vocabulary.context: Seaweed, a kind of algae, is eaten in soups, salads, as dried snacks, and as a wrap around sushi.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 海藻是一种藻类，可用于汤、沙拉、干零食和寿司卷

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 施肥, 使丰饶, 使受精
vocabulary.context: Robots and self-driving machines help farmers plant, water, and fertilize crops.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 机器人和自动驾驶机器帮助农民种植农作物、浇水和施肥

vocabulary.definition: n. 两者择一, 供替代的选择；adj. 两者择一的, 供选择的；[计] 选择对象
vocabulary.context: Greenhouses are an alternative to fields - they're buildings made of glass or plastic that let light in but keep bad weather out.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 温室是田地的替代品 - 它们是由玻璃或塑料制成的建筑物，可以让光线进入，但可以阻挡恶劣天气

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 施洗礼, 使经受考验, 命名
vocabulary.context: Before she died the priests baptized her and gave her the Spanish name Juana Maria.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在她去世之前，神父们为她施洗，并给她起了西班牙名字胡安娜·玛丽亚

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未被注意的, 无记号的, 无标志的
vocabulary.context: The priests buried her in an unmarked grave in the cemetery next to the Santa Barbara Mission, where she remains today.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 神父们将她埋葬在圣巴巴拉传教区旁边墓地的一个没有标记的坟墓里，她至今仍留在那里

vocabulary.definition: n. 水獭, 水獭皮
vocabulary.context: In the 1800s, hunters from Russia often traveled from Alaska down to the California coast looking for sea otters.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在 1800 年代，来自俄罗斯的猎人经常从阿拉斯加前往加利福尼亚海岸寻找海獭

vocabulary.definition: adv. 悲剧地, 悲惨地
vocabulary.context: Tragically, her child died soon after the rest of the Nicoleño left.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不幸的是，在尼科莱尼奥家族的其他成员离开后不久，她的孩子就去世了

vocabulary.definition: n. 海豚
vocabulary.context: Every year thousands of kids across the country read Scott O'Dell's book Island of the Blue Dolphins , which tells the story of a woman living alone on a small California island for many years.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每年全国各地都有成千上万的孩子阅读斯科特·奥德尔的书《蓝海豚岛》，该书讲述了一名妇女在加利福尼亚小岛上独自生活多年的故事

vocabulary.definition: adj. 狂热的, 热心的, 热烈的
vocabulary.context: Even though she had trouble communicating, she seemed very enthusiastic about her new life.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管她沟通有困难，但她似乎对新生活非常热情

vocabulary.definition: adv. 自动地, 欣然地
vocabulary.context: She willingly went back with them to the mainland.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她心甘情愿地跟他们一起回到了大陆

vocabulary.definition: n. 阴谋, 复杂的事；v.i. 密谋, 私通；v.t. 激起...的兴趣, 用诡计取得
vocabulary.context: Her story has intrigued and inspired readers and historians ever since she was rescued.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 自从她获救以来，她的故事一直引起读者和历史学家的兴趣和启发

vocabulary.definition: n. 快车, 快递, 专使；adj. 明确的, 丝毫不差的, 专门的, 快的；v.t. 表达, 表示, 表露
vocabulary.context: She expressed fascination at the European food and clothing that the priests had introduced to the area.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她对牧师们引入该地区的欧洲食物和衣服表示着迷

vocabulary.definition: adj. 静物的; 静物画(或照)的
vocabulary.context: Kahlo's paintings are a unique mix of Mexican folk art, realistic portraits and still-life images, as well as gory interpretations of history and emotions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 卡罗的画作独特地融合了墨西哥民间艺术、写实肖像和静物图像，以及对历史和情感的血腥诠释

vocabulary.definition: n. 自画像
vocabulary.context: With that goal in mind, she painted self-portraits and other scenes to represent different aspects of Mexican culture and women's experiences in that culture.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 考虑到这一目标，她画了自画像和其他场景来代表墨西哥文化的不同方面以及该文化中女性的经历

vocabulary.definition: n. 骨盆；[医] 骨盆; 盂, 肾盂
vocabulary.context: However, at the age of 18 Kahlo was riding a bus when it collided with a streetcar, and she was so badly injured in the ribs, back, and pelvis that she had to spend three months on bed-rest to recover.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，18岁的卡罗在乘坐公共汽车时与有轨电车相撞，肋骨、背部和骨盆严重受伤，不得不卧床三个月才能康复

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 成为前兆, 预示
vocabulary.context: Her very last drawing was a black angel, which many people see as a foreshadowing of her death in 1954.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她的最后一幅画是一位黑天使，许多人认为这是她 1954 年去世的伏笔

vocabulary.definition: adj. 预备性的, 准备性的；n. 预科
vocabulary.context: Later she enrolled at National Preparatory School, one of 35 female students at a school of over 2,000 students.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 后来她就读于国立预科学校，是一所拥有 2000 多名学生的学校中 35 名女学生之一

vocabulary.definition: n. 农作物, 产量, 平头；v.t. 收割, 修剪, 种植；v.i. 收获；[计] 裁剪
vocabulary.context: She produced some of her most famous paintings during the early 1940s, such as The Two Fridas, Self-Portrait with Cropped Hair , and The Wounded Table , and her art was featured in galleries from Mexico City to New York.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她在 20 世纪 40 年代初创作了一些最著名的画作，例如《两个弗里达》、《剪短发的自画像》和《受伤的桌子》，她的艺术作品在从墨西哥城到纽约的画廊中展出

vocabulary.definition: adj. 多花的, 绚丽的, 华丽的
vocabulary.context: Her unique personal style - dramatic eyebrows, fancy flowery headdresses, and bright colors - is so recognizable that her portraits still show up on magazine covers and as Halloween costumes today.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她独特的个人风格 - 戏剧性的眉毛、精美的花朵头饰和鲜艳的色彩 - 非常容易辨认，以至于她的肖像至今仍出现在杂志封面和万圣节服装上

vocabulary.definition: n. 解释, 演出, 翻译；[计] 插值; 插值法; 解释
vocabulary.context: Kahlo's paintings are a unique mix of Mexican folk art, realistic portraits and still-life images, as well as gory interpretations of history and emotions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 卡罗的画作独特地融合了墨西哥民间艺术、写实肖像和静物图像，以及对历史和情感的血腥诠释

vocabulary.definition: n. 疗养院, 休养地, 休养所, 疗养所；[医] 疗养院, 疗养所
vocabulary.context: Maggie also helped the black community to establish a sanitarium for tuberculosis patients and a home for delinquent girls.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 玛吉还帮助黑人社区建立了结核病患者疗养院和不良女孩之家

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 改造, 改型, 改变
vocabulary.context: She had an elevator installed in her home and had her car remodeled to accommodate her wheelchair.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她在家中安装了电梯，并改装了汽车以容纳她的轮椅

vocabulary.definition: n. 流水槽；v. 洗衣, 烫衣
vocabulary.context: "I started from a most lowly place in life, from an alley rather than a street; I started with my arms filled with laundered clothes rather than armfuls of trinkets and toys, with feet that have been well acquainted with the rough and rugged road of life.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我是从人生最卑微的地方开始的，是从巷子里开始的，而不是从大街上开始的；我开始的时候，怀里装满的是洗过的衣服，而不是一堆小饰品和玩具，双脚已经熟悉了生活的坎坷崎岖

vocabulary.definition: adj. 兄弟的, 兄弟似的, 友爱的
vocabulary.context: After graduation, Maggie put her energies into a fraternal organization, the Independent Order of Saint Luke (I.O.S.L.), which she had joined when she was fourteen.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 毕业后，玛吉将她的精力投入到一个兄弟组织--圣路加独立修会（I.O.S.L.），她在十四岁时加入了该组织

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 提, 负, 携带, 加, 合计；n. 负担, 携带
vocabulary.context: Sweat trickled down young Maggie Lena Mitchell's face as she toted the heavy basket of laundry throughout the steamy morning.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 年轻的玛吉·莉娜·米切尔在整个闷热的早晨提着沉重的洗衣篮，汗水从她的脸上淌下来

vocabulary.definition: n. 破产者；[经] 破产, 倒闭
vocabulary.context: The organization was on the verge of bankruptcy, so Maggie held rally after rally and was such an inspirational speaker that thousands of people would often attend.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 该组织濒临破产，因此玛吉举办了一次又一次的集会，她是一位鼓舞人心的演讲者，经常有成千上万的人参加

vocabulary.definition: n. 小件饰物, 无价值的琐碎东西, 小玩意儿
vocabulary.context: "I started from a most lowly place in life, from an alley rather than a street; I started with my arms filled with laundered clothes rather than armfuls of trinkets and toys, with feet that have been well acquainted with the rough and rugged road of life.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我是从人生最卑微的地方开始的，是从巷子里开始的，而不是从大街上开始的；我开始的时候，怀里装满的是洗过的衣服，而不是一堆小饰品和玩具，双脚已经熟悉了生活的坎坷崎岖

vocabulary.definition: adj. 地位低的, 卑下的, 谦卑的；adv. 位置低下的, 低声地, 谦逊地
vocabulary.context: "I started from a most lowly place in life, from an alley rather than a street; I started with my arms filled with laundered clothes rather than armfuls of trinkets and toys, with feet that have been well acquainted with the rough and rugged road of life.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我是从人生最卑微的地方开始的，是从巷子里开始的，而不是从大街上开始的；我开始的时候，怀里装满的是洗过的衣服，而不是一堆小饰品和玩具，双脚已经熟悉了生活的坎坷崎岖

vocabulary.definition: n. 江河中行驶的船
vocabulary.context: In 1919 he took a summer job playing the cornet on a riverboat.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1919年，他找到了一份暑期工作，在河船上吹短号

vocabulary.definition: interj. 嘘, 快走；v.i. 用拟声唱法唱；n. (模仿乐器的)拟声唱法
vocabulary.context: The musical style of jazz became popular around the world largely due to his talent as a cornet and trumpet player, his unique "scatting" singing style, and his strong and charming personality.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 爵士音乐风格风靡全球很大程度上得益于他作为短号和小号演奏家的天赋、独特的"散漫"演唱风格以及强烈而迷人的个性

vocabulary.definition: adj. 和气的, 有民间风味的
vocabulary.context: He revolutionized jazz from a folksy group performance to an individual performance.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他将爵士乐从民间团体表演彻底转变为个人表演

vocabulary.definition: n. 二重奏
vocabulary.context: Armstrong and Oliver became well known for playing duets, so they decided to produce some jazz records together.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 阿姆斯特朗和奥利弗因演奏二重唱而闻名，因此他们决定一起制作一些爵士乐唱片

vocabulary.definition: n. 圆锥形纸袋, 短号；[医] 小助听筒
vocabulary.context: The musical style of jazz became popular around the world largely due to his talent as a cornet and trumpet player, his unique "scatting" singing style, and his strong and charming personality.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 爵士音乐风格风靡全球很大程度上得益于他作为短号和小号演奏家的天赋、独特的"散漫"演唱风格以及强烈而迷人的个性

vocabulary.definition: adj. 即兴的
vocabulary.context: "Scatting" is a form of improvisational singing he popularized, in which the singer does not sing pre-written, real words, but instead sings whatever sounds and notes they feel fit with the music in the moment.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "Scatting"是他推广的一种即兴演唱形式，其中歌手不唱预先写好的真实歌词，而是唱他们认为与当时音乐相符的任何声音和音符

vocabulary.definition: v. （无经验之人的）有经验可信赖的顾问( mentor的过去式和过去分词 )
vocabulary.context: Soon he was discovered by the best cornet player in the city, Joe "King" Oliver, who mentored him and let him play in some of his shows.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 很快他就被城里最好的短号演奏家乔·"国王"·奥利弗发现，并指导他并让他参加一些演出

vocabulary.definition: n. 即兴而作, 即席演奏, 即席作品
vocabulary.context: He was very good at musical improvisation, not only on his trumpet but also in singing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他非常擅长音乐即兴创作，不仅在小号方面，而且在歌唱方面

vocabulary.definition: adj. 巧妙的, 狡猾的
vocabulary.context: One of their pieces, "West End Blues," is considered to be one of the most artful pieces of jazz, and it brought greater respect to the musical style and introduced it to a wider audience.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们的其中一首作品"西区布鲁斯"被认为是最巧妙的爵士乐作品之一，它给这种音乐风格带来了更大的尊重，并将其介绍给更广泛的听众

vocabulary.definition: adj. 非西方的；非西方社会的
vocabulary.context: Most of the Cotton Club shows included a "jungle" theme, based on a common idea of the time that non-Western cultures were wild and savage.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大多数棉花俱乐部的表演都包含"丛林"主题，基于当时非西方文化狂野和野蛮的普遍观念

vocabulary.definition: n. 造私酒者, 走私者, 走私犯
vocabulary.context: A Bootlegger's Dream
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 走私者的梦想

vocabulary.definition: v. 再创造( recreate的过去式和过去分词 ); 再现; 消遣; 娱乐
vocabulary.context: Other shows recreated the southern plantations of the early 1800s, where African Americans had been enslaved.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 其他节目再现了 1800 年代初期的南部种植园，非裔美国人在那里被奴役

vocabulary.definition: n. 温床
vocabulary.context: Today the Cotton Club is remembered as a cultural hotbed that groomed some of the greatest jazz musicians in the world, while also perpetuating harmful racial relationships.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如今，棉花俱乐部被视为培养世界上一些最伟大的爵士音乐家的文化温床，同时也使有害的种族关系长期存在

vocabulary.definition: n. 低音, 浅色, 小声
vocabulary.context: Despite the racist undertones, the Cotton Club featured many of the most famous African American musicians and performers of the time.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管存在种族主义色彩，棉花俱乐部还是聚集了许多当时最著名的非裔美国音乐家和表演者

vocabulary.definition: v. 重新开始, 重新启动；[计] 重新启动
vocabulary.context: The Cotton Club was briefly shut down for selling alcohol, but it restarted without much trouble.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 棉花俱乐部因卖酒而短暂关闭，但没遇到太大麻烦就重新启动了

vocabulary.definition: adv. 按人种, 人种上
vocabulary.context: was racially segregated.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 受到种族隔离

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可靠的, 可信的, 真正的；[法] 被认证的, 确认的, 可信的
vocabulary.context: Madden wanted to give "authentic black entertainment to a wealthy, whites-only audience."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 《Madden》希望为"富有的白人观众提供真正的黑人娱乐"

vocabulary.definition: n. 产品, 制造；v.t. 制造, 假造；v.i. 制造
vocabulary.context: government passed a law outlawing the manufacture and sale of alcohol across the country.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 政府通过了一项法律，禁止在全国范围内生产和销售酒精

vocabulary.definition: adj. 对环境无害的，环保的
vocabulary.context: However, they did not practice environmentally-friendly farming techniques.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，他们并没有采用环保的耕作技术

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不生产的, 无出产的, 不毛的；[经] 非生意性的, 浪费的
vocabulary.context: Their houses and belongings were always dirty; the dust blew into their lungs and made them sick; and their farms were unproductive.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们的房屋和财物总是脏兮兮的；灰尘吹进他们的肺部，使他们生病。他们的农场毫无生产力

vocabulary.definition: n. 上层土, 表层土
vocabulary.context: First, in order to plant as much wheat as possible, they plowed over all of the natural prairie grasses that kept the topsoil in place.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 首先，为了种植尽可能多的小麦，他们犁掉了所有保持表土固定的天然草原草

vocabulary.definition: n. 大风雪, 暴风雪
vocabulary.context: People called these strong dust storms "black blizzards," which could sometimes last for one or two days straight.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人们将这些强烈的沙尘暴称为"黑色暴风雪"，有时会持续一两天

vocabulary.definition: n. 失业, 失业人数；[经] 失业
vocabulary.context: Okies did manage to get away from the thick dust storms, but they could not escape unemployment and poverty.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 俄亥俄人确实摆脱了厚厚的沙尘暴，但他们却无法摆脱失业和贫困

vocabulary.definition: n. 干旱, 缺乏
vocabulary.context: This drought would have been bad enough for farmers, but then strong winds picked up across the Great Plains.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这场干旱对农民来说已经够糟糕的了，但随后大平原上刮起了强风

vocabulary.definition: adj. 农业的；[法] 农业的, 耕作的
vocabulary.context: Many headed all the way to California because they heard California had good agricultural jobs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 许多人千里迢迢来到加州，因为他们听说加州有很好的农业工作

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 回复, 恢复, 归还, 修补, 修复；v.t. 还原；v.i. 还原；[计] 还原; DOS外部命令:从备份盘中取回文件
vocabulary.context: A group of government employees planted trees throughout the region to restore root networks and keep the dirt stuck to the ground.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一群政府雇员在整个地区种植树木，以恢复根系网络并保持泥土粘在地面上

vocabulary.definition: n. 乡愁, 向往过去, 怀旧之情；[医] 怀乡病
vocabulary.context: But after doing some "Nostalgia: Library" by Eugene Kim is licensed research to find books with black girls as the under CC BY 2.0.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但在尤金·金（Eugene Kim）做了一些"怀旧：图书馆"之后，获得了在 CC BY 2.0 下寻找黑人女孩书籍的许可研究

vocabulary.definition: adj. 合作的；合作社的
vocabulary.context: According to Cooperative Children's Book Center, fewer than 10 percent of children's books released in 2015 had a black person as the main character.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 根据合作儿童图书中心的数据，2015年发行的儿童图书中，以黑人为主角的儿童图书不到10%

vocabulary.definition: n. 排除, 除外, 逐出；[医] 排除, 除外, 分离术
vocabulary.context: Dias says the exclusion of black girls in literature and schools "hurts all of us.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 迪亚斯说，在文学和学校中排斥黑人女孩"伤害了我们所有人

vocabulary.definition: n. 课程；[医] 课程, 学程
vocabulary.context: Dias realized she probably wasn't the only black girl feeling like she couldn't relate to her school reading curriculum.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 迪亚斯意识到她可能不是唯一一个觉得自己无法适应学校阅读课程的黑人女孩

vocabulary.definition: n. 出版者, 发行人；[法] 发行人, 出版者, 报刊发行者
vocabulary.context: Her publishers say her book will be a "keep it real guide" to social activism.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她的出版商表示，她的书将成为社会活动的"真实指南"

vocabulary.definition: n. 挫折, 顿挫；[医] 挫折
vocabulary.context: Dias wants to continue to inspire young people to do something about their frustrations.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 迪亚斯希望继续激励年轻人为他们的挫折做点什么

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 不一致, 不同；[机] 差异, 不同
vocabulary.context: Diverse(adjective)differing from one another She is also starting a book fair to continue to collect books to donate to other schools and communities where children might feel the same way she did.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 彼此不同的多样化（形容词） 她还开始举办一个书展，继续收集书籍捐赠给其他学校和社区，这些学校和社区的孩子们可能会和她有同样的感受

vocabulary.definition: n. 陌生人, 门外汉；[法] 局外人, 非当事人, 第三者
vocabulary.context: Now she says there are strangers thanking her for doing this.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 现在她说有陌生人感谢她这样做

vocabulary.definition: adv. 有效地, 有力地, 实际上
vocabulary.context: She will share tips for kids to make changes in their lives and communities and "pay it forward about whatever makes your heart sing." Dias wants to give other kids the tools to get support from their parents and teachers, use social media for good, and make change effectively.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她将分享一些建议，帮助孩子们改变他们的生活和社区，并"将一切让你心潮澎湃的事情传递出去"。迪亚斯希望为其他孩子提供获得父母和老师支持、利用社交媒体行善并有效做出改变的工具

vocabulary.definition: adj. 消息灵通的, 博识的, 见闻广博的
vocabulary.context: You should do background research on the topic while constructing your hypothesis so that your guess can be well-informed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在构建假设的同时，您应该对该主题进行背景研究，以便您的猜测能够得到充分的信息

vocabulary.definition: n. 曲线图, 图表, 图形；[计] 图形
vocabulary.context: Bar graphs and pie charts are also very useful graphs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 条形图和饼图也是非常有用的图表

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有确实根据的, 有法律效力的, 正当的, 正确的；[经] 有效的
vocabulary.context: But it's important to follow these steps because they allow us to test things in the most accurate and valid way possible.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但遵循这些步骤很重要，因为它们使我们能够以最准确、最有效的方式进行测试

vocabulary.definition: n. 易变的事物, 变数, 可变物, 变量；adj. 可变的, 不定的, 易变的, 变量的；[计] 变量
vocabulary.context: Variable - In experiments, the things that change are called variables.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 变量 - 在实验中，发生变化的事物称为变量

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 精炼, 净化, 使优雅, 使精炼；v.i. 被精炼, 被净化
vocabulary.context: The Scientific Method was developed by the ancient Greeks and has been refined by scientists ever since.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 科学方法是由古希腊人开发的，此后一直被科学家们改进

vocabulary.definition: n. 假设；[化] 假设
vocabulary.context: Construct a hypothesis
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 构建一个假设

vocabulary.definition: n. 程序, 过程, 手续；[计] 规程; 过程
vocabulary.context: You will often be asked to present a list of materials and the steps of your experiment - this is called the procedure.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 您经常会被要求提供材料清单和实验步骤 - 这称为程序

vocabulary.definition: n. 随意, 随机；adj. 任意的, 随便的, 胡乱的, 随机的；adv. 胡乱地
vocabulary.context: You also need to repeat the experiment several times to make sure the results were not random.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 您还需要多次重复实验，以确保结果不是随机的

vocabulary.definition: n. 陈述, 指令, 声明；[计] 程序语句; 语句
vocabulary.context: When forming your hypothesis, you can often fill in an if ____ , then ____ statement.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在形成假设时，您通常可以填写 if ____ , then ____ 语句

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使失去能力, 使残废, (律)使无资格；[计] 使无效, 禁止, 关闭
vocabulary.context: They chose to use the atomic bomb to quickly disable the Japanese military, hoping that, ultimately, fewer people would die.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们选择使用原子弹来迅速瘫痪日本军队，希望最终能减少死亡人数

vocabulary.definition: n. 战略家
vocabulary.context: soldiers had already died in the fight against Japan, and military strategists were worried the number would continue to climb if they tried to invade by land.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 士兵已经在抗日战争中阵亡，军事战略家担心，如果他们试图从陆路入侵，死亡人数还会继续攀升

vocabulary.definition: n. 发电所, 动力室, 精力旺盛的人, 办事效率高的机构
vocabulary.context: It became an industrial powerhouse.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它成为一个工业强国

vocabulary.definition: n. 工业化, 产业化；[经] 工业化
vocabulary.context: Industrialization and the construction of new railroad tracks around the turn of the century expanded the city.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 世纪之交的工业化和新铁轨的建设扩大了城市规模

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无法计数的, 无数的, 不可预料的
vocabulary.context: "[This weapon has] the power to destroy many innocent lives and do incalculable damage.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "[这种武器]有能力摧毁许多无辜的生命并造成无法估量的伤害

vocabulary.definition: adj. 最小的, 极微的, 最小限度的；[医] 最小的, 最低的
vocabulary.context: Even though studies have shown the long-term effects are minimal, some hibakusha are still treated with suspicion today.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管研究表明长期影响很小，但一些原爆幸存者至今仍受到怀疑

vocabulary.definition: adj. 战略的, 战略上的；[经] 战略的
vocabulary.context: A Strategic City
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 战略城市

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 转移, 使欢娱；v.i. 转移
vocabulary.context: An unexpected wind diverted the bomb's fall slightly; instead of landing on a bridge, it landed on a hospital 800 feet away.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一阵意外的风使炸弹的下落方向发生了轻微的改变；它没有降落在桥上，而是降落在 800 英尺外的一家医院上

vocabulary.definition: v. 收益分成耕种
vocabulary.context: This practice became known as sharecropping.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这种做法被称为佃农

vocabulary.definition: n. 借用人, 剽窃者；[经] 借款人, 借用人
vocabulary.context: Landowners sometimes sold sharecroppers seeds, shelter, and food for outrageous prices, slowly putting the borrowers into debt.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 土地所有者有时会以高得离谱的价格向佃农出售种子、住所和食品，慢慢地让借款人陷入债务

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不正当地；不公平地
vocabulary.context: Sharecropping contracts were often unfairly designed to keep poor sharecroppers poor.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 佃农合同往往是不公平的，旨在让贫穷的佃农陷入贫困

vocabulary.definition: n. 地主；[法] 土地所有人, 地主
vocabulary.context: Sharecroppers were not always given the promised portions of the crops they helped harvest, or they were not allowed to sell their share to anyone besides the landowner.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 佃农并不总是得到他们帮助收获的农作物的承诺部分，或者他们不被允许将他们的份额出售给地主以外的任何人

vocabulary.definition: n. 奴隶状态, 惩役, 地役权；[法] 苦役, 劳役, 奴役
vocabulary.context: This amendment, the 13th, stated that "Neither slavery nor involuntary servitude, except as a punishment for crime whereof the party shall have been duly convicted, shall exist within the United States, or any place subject to their jurisdiction."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 该修正案（第 13 条）规定，"除非作为对当事人已被正式定罪的犯罪的惩罚，否则奴隶制或非自愿奴役均不应存在于美国境内或受其管辖的任何地方。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 自传
vocabulary.context: In his autobiography, Holloway wrote that he and other former slaves "did not know how to be free" and that "white people did not know how to have a free colored person about them." His words reflect the difficulties of Reconstruction, a time period that came after the Civil War.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 霍洛威在自传中写道，他和其他前奴隶"不知道如何获得自由"，并且"白人不知道如何拥有一个自由的有色人种"。他的话反映了内战后重建时期的困难

vocabulary.definition: n. 改造, 再建；[医] 改建, 改造, 翻造
vocabulary.context: In his autobiography, Holloway wrote that he and other former slaves "did not know how to be free" and that "white people did not know how to have a free colored person about them." His words reflect the difficulties of Reconstruction, a time period that came after the Civil War.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 霍洛威在自传中写道，他和其他前奴隶"不知道如何获得自由"，并且"白人不知道如何拥有一个自由的有色人种"。他的话反映了内战后重建时期的困难

vocabulary.definition: n. 局, 办公处；[经] 局, 司, 处
vocabulary.context: The Freedmen's Bureau worked to set up schools and help former slaves find lost family members.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 自由民局致力于建立学校并帮助前奴隶寻找失踪的家庭成员

vocabulary.definition: n. 困难, 难点
vocabulary.context: In his autobiography, Holloway wrote that he and other former slaves "did not know how to be free" and that "white people did not know how to have a free colored person about them." His words reflect the difficulties of Reconstruction, a time period that came after the Civil War.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 霍洛威在自传中写道，他和其他前奴隶"不知道如何获得自由"，并且"白人不知道如何拥有一个自由的有色人种"。他的话反映了内战后重建时期的困难

vocabulary.definition: n. 不敬, 失礼, 无礼
vocabulary.context: This creates fear amongst the people and discourages anyone from doing anything that could be seen as disrespecting government.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这在人民中造成了恐惧，并阻止任何人做任何可能被视为不尊重政府的事情

vocabulary.definition: adj. 极权主义的；n. 极权主义者
vocabulary.context: Qualities of a Totalitarian Country
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 极权国家的品质

vocabulary.definition: n. 段落, 短评；v.t. 将...分段, 分段落；v.i. 写短讯；[计] 段落
vocabulary.context: Did you like the life described in the first two paragraphs?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你喜欢前两段描述的生活吗？

vocabulary.definition: n. 宣传, 宣传活动；[医] 宣传
vocabulary.context: Even though the Nazis did terrible things, many people were convinced by propaganda to support the government.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管纳粹做了可怕的事情，许多人还是被宣传说服支持政府

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 顺从, 依从；[法] 遵守, 承诺, 照做
vocabulary.context: A totalitarian country is a country where the government controls everything and requires all people to comply with strict rules.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 极权国家是政府控制一切并要求所有人遵守严格规则的国家

vocabulary.definition: n. 种族主义者；[法] 种族主义的, 种族歧视
vocabulary.context: The Nazis punished people who didn't agree with their racist ideas, and they murdered over 10 million people who they thought were inferior.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 纳粹惩罚那些不同意他们种族主义思想的人，他们杀害了超过1000万他们认为低等的人

vocabulary.definition: prep. 在...当中, 在...之间, 在...之中
vocabulary.context: This creates fear amongst the people and discourages anyone from doing anything that could be seen as disrespecting government.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这在人民中造成了恐惧，并阻止任何人做任何可能被视为不尊重政府的事情

vocabulary.definition: adj. 次等的, 较差的, 下方的, 下级的；n. 部下, 次品, 下标(符号)
vocabulary.context: The Nazis punished people who didn't agree with their racist ideas, and they murdered over 10 million people who they thought were inferior.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 纳粹惩罚那些不同意他们种族主义思想的人，他们杀害了超过1000万他们认为低等的人

vocabulary.definition: n. 主意, 办法, 理想, 思想, 概念, 意见；[医] 观念, 思想
vocabulary.context: The Nazis punished people who didn't agree with their racist ideas, and they murdered over 10 million people who they thought were inferior.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 纳粹惩罚那些不同意他们种族主义思想的人，他们杀害了超过1000万他们认为低等的人

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有收养关系的, 采用的；[法] 收养的, 采用的
vocabulary.context: And of course, Apollo, my adoptive father, brought his son Asclepius to me, as well.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当然，我的养父阿波罗也把他的儿子阿斯克勒庇俄斯带到了我这里

vocabulary.definition: n. 弓箭手（archer的复数形式）
vocabulary.context: Now Achilles is one of the greatest archers in the world!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 现在阿喀琉斯是世界上最伟大的弓箭手之一！

vocabulary.definition: adj. 草药的；[医] 本草书
vocabulary.context: Using my knowledge of herbal medicine, I was able to restore Phoenix's sight.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 利用我的草药知识，我使菲尼克斯恢复了视力

vocabulary.definition: adj. 熟练的, 老练的, 巧妙的；n. 能手, 内行
vocabulary.context: Asclepius was particularly adept at the healing arts, and I'm honored to have had a hand in sculpting the great god of medicine.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 阿斯克勒庇俄斯尤其擅长治疗艺术，我很荣幸能够参与雕刻这位伟大的医学之神

vocabulary.definition: n. 神谕, 神谕处, 预言
vocabulary.context: Seeing as you are an oracle - on top of all your other abilities - do you have any predictions about what, if anything, may ultimately cause your death?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 既然你是一位神谕者--除了你所有的其他能力之外--你对最终可能导致你死亡的因素（如果有的话）有任何预测吗？

vocabulary.definition: n. 叛逆者, 叛国者；[法] 叛徒, 叛逆, 背信者
vocabulary.context: As a young man, he was left stranded in the wilderness by the traitor Acastus.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 年轻时，他被叛徒阿卡斯托斯遗弃在荒野中

vocabulary.definition: adv. 另外, 此外
vocabulary.context: Additionally, I enjoy wearing human clothing from time to time, something my centaur brothers and sisters never try.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 此外，我喜欢时不时地穿着人类的衣服，这是我的半人马兄弟姐妹从未尝试过的

vocabulary.definition: adv. 公开地, 坦率地, 直率地, 公然地
vocabulary.context: Though she was disturbed by the vision and is not willing to speak openly about it, she did mention it involved Heracles and an arrow...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虽然她对这个异象感到不安并且不愿意公开谈论它，但她确实提到它涉及赫拉克勒斯和一支箭......

vocabulary.definition: n. 挑战, 盘问；v.t. 向...挑战, 要求, 怀疑；v.i. 挑战, 对(证据等)表示异议
vocabulary.context: Chiron, I've heard you had a challenging childhood - what happened and how did you get through it?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Chiron，我听说你有一个充满挑战的童年 - 发生了什么以及你是如何度过的？

vocabulary.definition: n. 竹芋；[医] 竹芋, 竹芋淀粉
vocabulary.context: She would stop to play among the clumps of bright-green arrowroot leaves and enjoy sips of cool, pure water.

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 例如，虽然美国无法审查仇恨言论，因为它受到第一修正案的"言论自由"保护，但它可以审查可能引发暴力的威胁性语言

vocabulary.context: As warm air expands, it becomes less dense and more buoyant than the cool air around it.

vocabulary.definition: adj. 气压的；[机] 气压的, 测定气压的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 观察者将记录八种不同的事物，从当地的气压和温度到大气条件的详细信息，例如风、云、雨或降雪量

vocabulary.definition: n. （有关进展、动向、建议等的）报告( advisory的复数形式 ); 公告; 通告; 通报
vocabulary.context: In fact, its on-line national map (www.weather.gov/view/largemap.php) refreshes itself every five minutes to offer updated watches, warnings, and advisories.

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 更新, 使现代化；n. 更新；[计] 更新

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 现在，沃尔什估计这艘船上至少栖息着 75 种动物，包括独角兽鱼、鲣鱼和海鳗

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使退役

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 许多人工鱼礁是利用退役船舶建造的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: Ulfelder 的团队致力于重振 20 世纪因污染而受损的纽约水道

vocabulary.definition: n. 海鳝

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 现在，沃尔什估计这艘船上至少栖息着 75 种动物，包括独角兽鱼、鲣鱼和海鳗

vocabulary.context: Now, more than a decade later, it's a popular spot for scuba diving, fishing, and submarine tours.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 十多年后的现在，这里已成为水肺潜水、钓鱼和潜艇旅游的热门地点

vocabulary.context: Reefs also help prevent erosion and protect coastal communities from flooding.

vocabulary.definition: n. 安乐, 安逸, 悠闲；v.t. 使安乐, 使安心, 减轻, 放松；v.i. 减轻, 放松, 灵活地移动
vocabulary.context: This eases pressure on natural habitats.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这减轻了对自然栖息地的压力

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人工鱼礁不是由珊瑚制成的，但它们可以提供许多相同的好处

vocabulary.definition: n. 多面手, 通才
vocabulary.context: Spiders are generalist predators that play important roles in controlling pests, including cockroaches and flies around your house if you'll let them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 蜘蛛是多面性的捕食者，在控制害虫方面发挥着重要作用，包括你房子周围的蟑螂和苍蝇（如果你允许的话）

vocabulary.definition: adj. 颜色丰富的, 鲜艳的, 艳丽的, 多色的, 丰富多彩的, 吸引人的, 引人入胜的；[计] 有色的
vocabulary.context: In addition to the colourful patterns on their flared abdomens, the males dance with their back legs and drum with their front legs to attract a female.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 除了张开的腹部上有彩色图案外，雄性还用后腿跳舞、用前腿敲鼓来吸引雌性

vocabulary.definition: n. 住在同一所房子里的人
vocabulary.context: Unlike your average housemate, spiders definitely pull their weight around the house.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 与普通的室友不同，蜘蛛肯定会在房子周围发挥作用

vocabulary.definition: adj. 鬼祟的, 卑微的
vocabulary.context: This is a sneaky strategy to avoid predation by birds and can fool even the sharpest of eyes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是一种避免鸟类捕食的狡猾策略，甚至可以欺骗最敏锐的眼睛

vocabulary.definition: n. 求爱, 求婚, 求爱时期
vocabulary.context: We all know it can be hard to catch the eye of that special someone, but the little peacock spiders have courtship down to an art.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们都知道要引起那个特别的人的注意可能很困难，但小孔雀蜘蛛的求爱是一门艺术

vocabulary.context: So don't be spooked by any Halloween spiders you encounter this year.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 所以，不要被今年遇到的任何万圣节蜘蛛吓到

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 滴注, 慢慢地灌输
vocabulary.context: But in reality, spiders deserve to instill a sense of amazement, not fear.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但实际上，蜘蛛应该给人一种惊奇感，而不是恐惧感

vocabulary.definition: adj. 体贴的, 体谅的, 考虑周到的
vocabulary.context: They are quiet, clean, considerate and will happily clear out all of the unwanted bugs living under your cupboards.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们安静、干净、体贴，很乐意清除橱柜下所有不需要的虫子

vocabulary.definition: adj. 大的, 大量的, 宽大的, 广博的；adv. 大大地, 夸大地
vocabulary.context: There are even spiders who use debris to draw images of larger spiders - presumably to trick predators into thinking that they are larger than they actually are.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 甚至有些蜘蛛利用碎片画出更大蜘蛛的图像--大概是为了欺骗捕食者，让他们认为它们比实际尺寸更大

vocabulary.definition: n. 鼻出血；[医] 鼻出血, 衄血

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 想象一下坐在棒球比赛中流鼻血的座位上

vocabulary.definition: v. 连续猛打（尤其指妇女），猛击；n. 面糊（食物），击球员，打击手
vocabulary.context: You see the batter hit the ball a second before you hear the crack of the bat.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在听到球棒的爆裂声之前，您会看到击球手击球

vocabulary.definition: adj. 根深蒂固的, 彻底的, 深染的
vocabulary.context: It might be ingrained from when you were a kid, and now it's almost automatic.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这可能从你小时候就根深蒂固，现在几乎是自动的

vocabulary.definition: n. 雷暴雨
vocabulary.context: Thunder can be heard up to 25 miles away, and lightning strikes have been documented to occur as far as 25 miles from thunderstorms - known as a "bolt from the blue." So if you can hear thunder, you're close enough to be hit by lightning, and sheltering indoors or in an enclosed car is your safest bet.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 雷声可在 25 英里外听到，据记载，雷击发生在距雷暴 25 英里远的地方 - 被称为"晴天霹雳"。因此，如果您能听到雷声，则说明您离闪电足够近，躲在室内或封闭的汽车内是最安全的选择

vocabulary.definition: n. 相等, 等式, 平衡；[化] 方程式; 等式; 反应式; 公式
vocabulary.context: Let's simplify the speed equation: Sound travels a little over 700 miles per hour, or 700 miles in 3,600 seconds.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 让我们简化一下速度方程：声音传播的速度略高于每小时 700 英里，即 3,600 秒内传播 700 英里

vocabulary.definition: adv. 在户内
vocabulary.context: Thunder can be heard up to 25 miles away, and lightning strikes have been documented to occur as far as 25 miles from thunderstorms - known as a "bolt from the blue." So if you can hear thunder, you're close enough to be hit by lightning, and sheltering indoors or in an enclosed car is your safest bet.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 雷声可在 25 英里外听到，据记载，雷击发生在距雷暴 25 英里远的地方 - 被称为"晴天霹雳"。因此，如果您能听到雷声，则说明您离闪电足够近，躲在室内或封闭的汽车内是最安全的选择

vocabulary.definition: n. 自动手枪, 自动机械；adj. 自动的, 机械的, 必然的, 无意识的
vocabulary.context: It might be ingrained from when you were a kid, and now it's almost automatic.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这可能从你小时候就根深蒂固，现在几乎是自动的

vocabulary.definition: adv. 同时发生, 一齐, 同时, 同时存在
vocabulary.context: If you're really close to the lightning, you will see it and hear the thunder simultaneously.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果你真的很接近闪电，你会同时看到它并听到雷声

vocabulary.definition: adj. 非常的, 强烈的, 紧张的, 热情的；[医] 强的
vocabulary.context: The thunder you hear is the rapid expansion of the air in response to the lightning's intense heat.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你听到的雷声是空气因闪电的高温而迅速膨胀的声音

vocabulary.definition: n. 地带, 地区, 地形, 领域, 范围
vocabulary.context: This means we are meant to overcome everything that gets in our way, be that wars or bad terrain or Indians.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这意味着我们要克服一切阻碍我们的事情，无论是战争、恶劣的地形还是印第安人

vocabulary.definition: n. 宽恕, 宽仁之心
vocabulary.context: I know in my heart that these Indians deserve God's forgiveness, like the rest of us.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我心里知道这些印度人像我们其他人一样值得上帝的宽恕。 【07】我知道笼中鸟的感受，唉！ 【08】我知道笼中鸟为何拍打翅膀

vocabulary.definition: n. 传教士, 负有任务者, 工作人员；adj. 传教的, 传教士的
vocabulary.context: As missionaries, my husband and I will bring the word of God to the Indians, if they will have us.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 作为传教士，我和我的丈夫将把上帝的话语带给印第安人，如果他们愿意的话

vocabulary.definition: n. 载货单, 运货单, 旅客名单；adj. 显然的, 明白的；v.i. 显示, 出现；v.t. 表明, 表现, 证明
vocabulary.context: Manifest Destiny says that God has chosen us to take over this country, all the way to the coast.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 昭昭命运说上帝选择了我们来接管这个国家，一直到海岸

vocabulary.definition: n. 辞别, 再见, 再会；interj. 再会
vocabulary.context: This is farewell, dear friend.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 再见了，亲爱的朋友

vocabulary.definition: n. 先锋, 拓荒者, 创始人；v.t. 提倡, 开辟, 开创, 倡导；v.i. 作先驱, 开路；adj. 最早的, 开拓的, 先驱的, 有开拓者特点的
vocabulary.context: Nothing will stand in the way of the pioneers settling this great new land of ours.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 没有什么能阻挡拓荒者在我们这片伟大的新土地上定居的道路

vocabulary.definition: n. 印度人, 印第安人, 印第安语；adj. 印度的, 印度群岛的, 印第安语的
vocabulary.context: Yes, those Indians were here first, but we do not think of them as Christians.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 是的，那些印第安人首先来到这里，但我们并不认为他们是基督徒

vocabulary.definition: n. 地平线, 眼界, (天)视地平
vocabulary.context: Out past the horizon to see what waits for us in the west.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 越过地平线，看看西方有什么在等待着我们

vocabulary.definition: n. 文明, 教化；[法] 文明, 文化, 文明国家的总称
vocabulary.context: We carry the light of civilization, man's most advanced state of society.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们承载着文明之光，人类最先进的社会状态

vocabulary.definition: n. 进口, 插入物；[化] 入口; 进口; 投料口; 供料口
vocabulary.context: Some Confederate leaders were sure the enemy fleet would try to take over South Carolina's Port Royal Sound, a wide inlet off the Atlantic near the state's southern border.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一些南方邦联领导人确信敌方舰队将试图占领南卡罗来纳州的罗亚尔湾，这是该州南部边境附近大西洋上的一个宽阔的入口

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使大喜
vocabulary.context: People in the North were overjoyed by the great naval victory at Port Royal Sound and the occupation of Southern territory.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 北方人民对皇家港的海军大胜和南方领土的占领感到欣喜若狂

vocabulary.definition: n. 输出品, 输出；v.t. 输出, 出口；v.i. 输出物资；[计] 导出
vocabulary.context: They needed the harbor at Port Royal as a base for ships that patrolled the southern coast to keep the Confederacy from importing weapons and exporting cotton.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们需要皇家港港口作为在南部海岸巡逻的船只的基地，以防止南部邦联进口武器和出口棉花

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未答复的, 无反应的
vocabulary.context: Just one question was left unanswered: What part of the South would be invaded?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 只有一个问题没有得到解答：南方的哪一部分会被入侵？

vocabulary.definition: n. 堡垒, 要塞, 易货站；v.t. 设要塞保卫；v.i. 设要塞
vocabulary.context: The Confederate forts, one on each side of the wide entry to Port Royal Sound, didn't stand a chance against cannon fire from the Union warships that steamed past them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 邦联堡垒位于皇家港宽阔入口的两侧，没有机会抵御驶过的联邦军舰的炮火

vocabulary.definition: n. 厄运, 不幸, 法律, 宣告, 判决, 死亡；v.t. 命中注定, 判决
vocabulary.context: The experiment ended when the war did, however: After the army left the area, there were no more jobs - and that doomed the town of Mitchelville.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，当战争爆发时，实验就结束了：军队离开该地区后，就没有更多的工作机会--这注定了米切尔维尔镇的灭亡

vocabulary.definition: n. 军火, 弹药；[机] 弹药
vocabulary.context: The papers were full of stories about a huge fleet of Union ships heading south -not just warships but also ships carrying thousands of soldiers, ships full of supplies for the men, ships full of coal and a ship full of ammunition - 77 ships in all.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 报纸上充斥着关于一支庞大的联邦舰队南下的故事--不仅有军舰，还有载有数千名士兵的船只、装满士兵补给的船只、装满煤炭的船只和装满弹药的船只--总共77艘船

vocabulary.definition: adj. 海军的, 军舰的, 有舰队的；[法] 海军的, 军舰的, 船的
vocabulary.context: People in the North were overjoyed by the great naval victory at Port Royal Sound and the occupation of Southern territory.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 北方人民对皇家港的海军大胜和南方领土的占领感到欣喜若狂

vocabulary.definition: n. 损害, 伤害；v. 损害
vocabulary.context: The forts' defenders fired back, of course, and though hitting moving targets is hard, they did cause some damage.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当然，堡垒的防御者还击，虽然击中移动目标很困难，但确实造成了一些损害

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使浪漫化, 夸张, 使幻想化；v.i. 有浪漫主义思想, 幻想化
vocabulary.context: But what no one ever seems to notice is that without the things I've done, the world may not have "A romanticised 19th-century recreation of become a place where many people can vote King John signing the Magna Carta" by James William Edmund Doyle is in the public domain.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但似乎没有人注意到的是，如果没有我所做的事情，世界可能不会有詹姆斯·威廉·埃德蒙·道尔所写的"浪漫化的 19 世纪娱乐场所，成为许多人可以投票支持约翰国王签署大宪章的地方"

vocabulary.definition: n. (事物的)主体, 文集, 本金, 语料库；[医] 体
vocabulary.context: Habeas Corpus is a law that says a person who has is arrested must go before a court that will decide if that person should go to jail or not.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人身保护令是一项法律，规定被捕者必须出庭，法院将决定该人是否应该入狱

vocabulary.definition: adj. 封建制度的, 封地的, 领地的
vocabulary.context: They led the people within their feudal lands - lands they had been granted by the king to organize for the common subjects.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们在封建土地上领导人民--这些土地是国王授予他们为共同臣民组织的

vocabulary.definition: n. 特许状, 执照, 宪章；v.t. 特许, 发给特许执照
vocabulary.context: The Latin phrase means 'the Greater Charter of the Liberties." 4.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 拉丁语的意思是"更大的自由宪章"。4

vocabulary.definition: n. 表示法, 表现, 陈述, 代表；[计] 表示法指定
vocabulary.context: The people now had representation.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人民现在有了代表权

vocabulary.definition: n. 叛乱, 反抗, 反感；v.i. 叛乱, 反抗, 起义, 厌恶, 反感；v.t. 使反感, 使恶心
vocabulary.context: It was the barons who revolted.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 造反的是贵族们

vocabulary.definition: n. 税, 税款, 重负, 会费；v.t. 课以税, 使负重荷, 斥责
vocabulary.context: They loved him even though he made them pay lots of taxes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管他让他们交了很多税，但他们还是爱他

vocabulary.definition: n. 贵族；adj. 高贵的, 高尚的, 贵族的, 辉煌的
vocabulary.context: Barons represented the common people on their land but had to pay respects and taxes to all higher nobles, especially the king.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 男爵代表其土地上的普通民众，但必须向所有高级贵族，特别是国王表示敬意和纳税

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 表现, 表示, 描绘, 讲述, 代表, 象征, 回忆, 再赠送, 再上演；v.i. 提出异议
vocabulary.context: Barons represented the common people on their land but had to pay respects and taxes to all higher nobles, especially the king.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 男爵代表其土地上的普通民众，但必须向所有高级贵族，特别是国王表示敬意和纳税

vocabulary.definition: adv. 爆发地, 引起爆炸地
vocabulary.context: The shape of the volcano and how explosively it erupts depend largely on how "sticky" and how "fizzy" (how much gas) the magma is that is erupted.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 火山的形状及其喷发的剧烈程度很大程度上取决于喷发的岩浆的"粘性"和"泡沫"程度（多少气体）

vocabulary.definition: n. 破火山口
vocabulary.context: Volcanoes have many different shapes and sizes, some look like steep mountains (stratovolcanoes), others look like bumps (shield volcanoes) and some are flat with a hole (a crater or caldera) in the centre that is often filled with water.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 火山有许多不同的形状和大小，有些看起来像陡峭的山脉（成层火山），有些看起来像凸起（盾状火山），有些则平坦，中心有一个洞（火山口或破火山口），通常充满水

vocabulary.definition: adj. 松软的, 水分过多的, 流鼻涕的
vocabulary.context: For example, if you try to blow bubbles in cooking oil through a straw, the bubbles can escape quite easily because the cooking oil is runny.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 例如，如果您尝试用吸管向食用油中吹出气泡，气泡很容易逸出，因为食用油是流动的

vocabulary.definition: n. 飞机；[机] 飞机
vocabulary.context: If aeroplanes travel through an ash cloud from a volcano it can cause a lot of damage to the engine.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果飞机穿过火山灰云，可能会对发动机造成严重损坏

vocabulary.definition: adv. 以上, 向上
vocabulary.context: This magma is lighter than the rocks around it and so it rises upwards.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这种岩浆比周围的岩石轻，因此它会向上上升

vocabulary.definition: n. 火山
vocabulary.context: The shape of the volcano and how explosively it erupts depend largely on how "sticky" and how "fizzy" (how much gas) the magma is that is erupted.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 火山的形状及其喷发的剧烈程度很大程度上取决于喷发的岩浆的"粘性"和"泡沫"程度（多少气体）

vocabulary.definition: n. 中心, 中心点, 中锋；adj. 中央的, 位在正中的；v.t. 集中, 定中心；v.i. 居中
vocabulary.context: Volcanoes have many different shapes and sizes, some look like steep mountains (stratovolcanoes), others look like bumps (shield volcanoes) and some are flat with a hole (a crater or caldera) in the centre that is often filled with water.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 火山有许多不同的形状和大小，有些看起来像陡峭的山脉（成层火山），有些看起来像凸起（盾状火山），有些则平坦，中心有一个洞（火山口或破火山口），通常充满水

vocabulary.definition: n. 浸渍, 悬崖；adj. 险峻的, 陡峭的, 急剧升降的, 夸大的；v. 浸, 泡
vocabulary.context: Volcanoes have many different shapes and sizes, some look like steep mountains (stratovolcanoes), others look like bumps (shield volcanoes) and some are flat with a hole (a crater or caldera) in the centre that is often filled with water.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 火山有许多不同的形状和大小，有些看起来像陡峭的山脉（成层火山），有些看起来像凸起（盾状火山），有些则平坦，中心有一个洞（火山口或破火山口），通常充满水

vocabulary.definition: adv. 大量地, 很多地, 大半地
vocabulary.context: The shape of the volcano and how explosively it erupts depend largely on how "sticky" and how "fizzy" (how much gas) the magma is that is erupted.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 火山的形状及其喷发的剧烈程度很大程度上取决于喷发的岩浆的"粘性"和"泡沫"程度（多少气体）

vocabulary.definition: n. 木兰, 浅桃红色；[医] 木兰属
vocabulary.context: The other side didn't have a creek or magnolia trees
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 彼岸没有小溪，也没有玉兰树

vocabulary.definition: n. 椒盐卷饼, (美)(非正式)法国号
vocabulary.context: hot dogs and pretzels on the street.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 街上的热狗和椒盐卷饼

vocabulary.definition: adj. 遥远的, 恍惚的, 出神的
vocabulary.context: At night the hum of the subway and faraway sirens
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 夜晚地铁的嗡嗡声和远处的警报声

vocabulary.definition: n. 女海妖, 妖女, 警报器, 汽笛, 迷人的美女；adj. 诱惑的；v.i. 响着警报器前进
vocabulary.context: At night the hum of the subway and faraway sirens
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 夜晚地铁的嗡嗡声和远处的警报声

vocabulary.definition: n. 地铁, 地道；v.i. 乘地铁
vocabulary.context: At night the hum of the subway and faraway sirens
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 夜晚地铁的嗡嗡声和远处的警报声

vocabulary.definition: n. 家常小甜饼, 饼干, 普通小饼, 巨型炸弹, (非正式)(女)厨师, 厨师助手
vocabulary.context: and warm women who smelled like cookies hugging you
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 和温暖的女人，闻起来像饼干拥抱你

vocabulary.definition: n. 小溪, 小河, 小湾
vocabulary.context: The other side didn't have a creek or magnolia trees
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 彼岸没有小溪，也没有玉兰树

vocabulary.definition: n. 假期, 休假；[法] 假期, 停审期, 休庭期
vocabulary.context: I'd seen it on vacation and TV.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我在假期和电视上看到过它

vocabulary.definition: n. 建筑物, 建筑；[法] 营造, 建筑, 建筑物
vocabulary.context: The other side had tall buildings and I could buy
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那边有高楼，我可以买

vocabulary.definition: n. 杂种；v. 异种交配, 培育杂种, (使)杂交
vocabulary.context: And that's not even counting the "designer dog" crossbreeds.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这还不包括"设计狗"杂交品种

vocabulary.definition: n. 快速船
vocabulary.context: From fluffy goldendoodles to sleek greyhounds to giant mastiffs - all dogs come from ancient wolves.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 从毛茸茸的金毛犬到光滑的灵缇犬再到巨型獒犬--所有的狗都来自古代狼

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 养驯, 引进(外来词等), 教化
vocabulary.context: People take credit for domesticating dogs, but scientists have figured out that it didn't happen that way.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人们把驯养狗归功于自己，但科学家发现事实并非如此

vocabulary.definition: n. 傻子, 笨蛋, 狗
vocabulary.context: Or the many mixed-breeds called "mutts."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 或者是许多被称为"杂种狗"的混种狗

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 娇养, 溺爱, 放纵；n. 一种矮脚长耳猎犬, 斗鸡的人
vocabulary.context: This includes breeds like cockapoos (cocker spaniel-poodle), puggles (pug-beagle), goldendoodles (golden retriever-poodle), and chiweenies (Chihuahua-dachshund).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这包括可卡犬（可卡犬-贵宾犬）、哈巴狗（哈巴狗-比格犬）、金毛犬（金毛猎犬-贵宾犬）和奇威尼犬（吉娃娃-腊肠犬）等品种

vocabulary.definition: adj. 敏捷的, 伶俐的, 聪明的
vocabulary.context: Others bred nimble dogs that could herd sheep.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 其他人饲养了可以放羊的敏捷狗

vocabulary.definition: adj. 选择的, 选择性的；[经] 选择的, 选择性的
vocabulary.context: They did it through a practice called selective breeding .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们通过一种称为选择性育种的做法做到了这一点

vocabulary.definition: n. 设计者, 谋划者, 制图者；[计] 设计员
vocabulary.context: And that's not even counting the "designer dog" crossbreeds.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这还不包括"设计狗"杂交品种

vocabulary.definition: adj. 令人想望的, 可取的
vocabulary.context: Of course, not everyone agreed on the "best dogs" or the most desirable traits.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当然，并不是每个人都同意"最好的狗"或最理想的特征

vocabulary.definition: n. 凭记忆, 暗记
vocabulary.context: Izzy had been working, rehearsing her memorization skills and her polite grin, and wanted to prove she was mature enough to take on the customers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 伊兹一直在工作，练习她的记忆技巧和礼貌的笑容，并想证明她足够成熟，可以接待顾客

vocabulary.definition: adj. 名牌的
vocabulary.context: Kassy Goericke was at Table 6, with her shiny black hair and her name-brand jeans.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Kassy Goericke 坐在 6 号桌，一头闪亮的黑发，穿着名牌牛仔裤
