vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为了保持士气高昂，每个国家都贡献了对本国重要的不同食物

vocabulary.definition: n. （尤指工业废热发电或发电余热利用的）同时发热发电
vocabulary.context: Using the leftover heat from a power generator has a term and history all its own: cogeneration, or combined heat and power (CHP) .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 利用发电机的余热有其独特的术语和历史：热电联产或热电联产 (CHP)

vocabulary.definition: adj. 前沿的, 最前沿的
vocabulary.context: "Our first and highest duty is to supply our customers with electricity, so we don't do a lot of cutting-edge or experimental work in that area." But when another company had an innovative, "green" idea, Rocky Mountain Power signed up.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我们的首要也是最高职责是为客户提供电力，因此我们在该领域没有做很多前沿或实验性工作。"但当另一家公司提出创新的"绿色"想法时，落基山电力公司签约了

vocabulary.definition: n. 虹吸管；v.t. 用虹吸管吸出, 抽取；v.i. 通过虹吸管
vocabulary.context: Eskelsen says the process of siphoning off the waste heat and carbon dioxide doesn't affect the power plant at all, and the company's leaders were happy to work with Houweling's.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Eskelsen 表示，吸走废热和二氧化碳的过程根本不会影响发电厂，公司领导很高兴与 Houweling 合作

vocabulary.definition: adj. 集中的；中央集权的
vocabulary.context: The idea stuck around through the early years of commercial electricity but grew less popular as consumers began to demand more and more power and companies started building larger, more centralized power plants to produce enough electricity to keep up.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这个想法在商业电力的早期一直存在，但随着消费者开始需要越来越多的电力以及公司开始建造更大、更集中的发电厂以产生足够的电力来满足需求，它变得不那么受欢迎了

vocabulary.definition: n. 输出, 产品, 产量；[计] 输出
vocabulary.context: "As customer needs increase, we have to increase our generation, and as customer needs decrease, at night, we have to decrease our output," says Dave Eskelsen, a spokesperson for Rocky Mountain Power.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "随着客户需求的增加，我们必须增加发电量，而随着客户需求的减少，我们必须减少夜间的发电量，"落基山电力公司发言人戴夫·埃斯克尔森 (Dave Eskelsen) 说

vocabulary.definition: adj. 一年到头的, 整年的
vocabulary.context: The company decided to search for a new place to build a greenhouse that would let them capture and reuse industrial heat and CO2 waste to grow tomatoes year-round, he says.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他说，该公司决定寻找一个新的地方建造温室，让他们能够捕获和再利用工业热量和二氧化碳废物来全年种植西红柿

vocabulary.definition: n. 小部分, 破片, 分数；[医] 部分, 成分, 分散
vocabulary.context: As of 2021, it could grow 750 acres worth of tomatoes with a fraction of the resources.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 截至 2021 年，它可以用一小部分资源种植价值 750 英亩的西红柿

vocabulary.definition: n. 主席, 会长；[经] 主席
vocabulary.context: Company chairman Casey Houweling runs the business.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 公司董事长 Casey Houweling 负责经营业务

vocabulary.definition: n. 引起喧闹的人(物)
vocabulary.context: Sometimes her speeches were rough and coarse - she referred to herself as a "hell-raiser." One opponent called her "the most dangerous woman in America." But her words energized workers to fight for better conditions and pay.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有时她的讲话粗鲁无礼--她称自己为"地狱使者"。一位反对者称她为"美国最危险的女性"。但她的话激励工人们争取更好的条件和工资

vocabulary.definition: n. 证明书, 介绍信, 奖品, 奖金, 奖状, 感谢信, 表扬信；adj. (有关)证明书的, 鉴定书的, 表扬的, 褒奖的
vocabulary.context: African-American civil rights activist Fannie Lou Hamer gave an electrifying testimonial in 1964.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 非裔美国民权活动家范妮·卢·哈默 (Fannie Lou Hamer) 于 1964 年发表了令人振奋的感言

vocabulary.definition: n. 炼钢工人
vocabulary.context: She spoke for children, mill workers, coal miners, steelworkers, and immigrants.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她为儿童、工厂工人、煤矿工人、钢铁工人和移民发声

vocabulary.definition: n. 工作日, (一天的)工作时数；[机] 工作天
vocabulary.context: After more than two months, owners agreed to better pay and shorter workdays.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 两个多月后，业主们同意提高工资和缩短工作时间

vocabulary.definition: n. 农奴, 奴隶, 服苦役的人
vocabulary.context: You will not be serfs, you will march, march, march on from milestone to milestone of human freedom, you will rise like men in the new day and slavery will get its death blow.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你们不会成为农奴，你们将前进、前进、从人类自由的一个里程碑迈向另一个里程碑，你们将在新的一天像男人一样崛起，奴隶制将受到致命的打击

vocabulary.definition: n. 速记员
vocabulary.context: Her speech survives today because the mine bosses hired a stenographer to take notes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她的演讲之所以能流传至今，是因为矿主雇了一名速记员来做笔记

vocabulary.definition: n. 节欲, 戒酒, 禁酒, 节制；[医] 节制(饮食等), 戒酒
vocabulary.context: They supported women's rights and temperance.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们支持妇女权利和禁酒

vocabulary.definition: n. 耻辱, 不名誉；v.t. 使受耻辱, 使失体面
vocabulary.context: "[Lynching] is national - a blight upon our nation, mocking our laws and disgracing our Christianity.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "[私刑]是全国性的--对我们国家来说是一种伤害，嘲笑我们的法律并羞辱我们的基督教

vocabulary.definition: adv. 爱嘲笑地；冷笑地
vocabulary.context: "Wait and see," my husband said cynically.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "等等看，"我丈夫愤世嫉俗地说

vocabulary.definition: adj. 象主妇的, 有威严的, 稳重的
vocabulary.context: At the meeting I sat restlessly, scanning each comfortable matronly face, trying to determine which one hid the secret of Charles.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在会议上，我坐立不安，扫视着每张舒适的主妇面孔，试图找出哪一张隐藏着查尔斯的秘密

vocabulary.definition: adv. 虔诚地
vocabulary.context: "If only she's there," I said prayerfully.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "要是她在那里就好了，"我虔诚地说

vocabulary.definition: adv. 精神错乱地, 疯狂地, 极其愚蠢地, 脱离实际地
vocabulary.context: Gee, you're dumb." He began to laugh insanely.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 哎呀，你真笨。"他开始疯狂地大笑

vocabulary.definition: adv. 循规蹈矩地, 整洁地
vocabulary.context: "We had a little trouble adjusting, the first week or so," she said primly, "but now he's a fine little helper.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "第一周左右，我们在适应方面遇到了一些麻烦，"她一本正经地说，"但现在他是一个很好的小帮手了

vocabulary.definition: n. 改革, 改正, 重新形成, 重新组成
vocabulary.context: During the third and fourth weeks it looked like a reformation in Charles; Laurie reported grimly at lunch on Thursday of the third week, "Charles was so good today the teacher gave him an apple."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在第三周和第四周，查尔斯看起来像是一场改革；第三周星期四的午餐时，劳里表情严肃地说："查尔斯今天表现得很好，老师给了他一个苹果。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 烟灰缸
vocabulary.context: ...full of mud and pulled it through the kitchen; even my husband, when he caught his elbow in the telephone cord and pulled telephone, ashtray, and a bowl of flowers off the table, said, after the first minute, "Looks like Charles."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...满是泥，拖过厨房；就连我的丈夫，当他用电话线夹住胳膊肘，把电话、烟灰缸和一碗花从桌子上拿下来时，第一分钟后也说："看起来像查尔斯。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 跷跷板；v.i. 上下移动
vocabulary.context: The third day - it was Wednesday of the first week - Charles bounced a see-saw on to the head of a little girl and made her bleed, and the teacher made him stay inside all during recess.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第三天，也就是第一周的星期三，查尔斯用跷跷板弹到了一个小女孩的头上，导致她流血，老师让他在课间休息期间一直呆在里面

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不相信地, 怀疑地
vocabulary.context: "What happened?" I asked incredulously.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "发生什么事了？"我难以置信地问道

vocabulary.definition: adv. 苦心经营地, 精巧地
vocabulary.context: "How was school today?" I asked, elaborately casual.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "今天学校怎么样？"我问，语气十分随意

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使呈杂色；n. 杂色, 斑点
vocabulary.context: "Sometimes it looked light colored, sometimes it looked mottled and dirty with the earth and ash it had carried up," he wrote.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "有时它看起来是浅色的，有时它看起来因泥土和灰烬而斑驳肮脏，"他写道

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不稳固的, 摇摆的, 不稳定的, 易变的, 不安定的, 不规则的, 古怪的, 无常的；v.t. 使不稳定, 使不安定, 动摇
vocabulary.context: They tried taking carts, but the shaking ground was too unsteady.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们尝试着推车，但摇晃的地面太不稳定了

vocabulary.definition: n. 军舰, 战船
vocabulary.context: Pliny the Elder quickly gathered several quadriremes, large warships with oars on either side.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 老普林尼很快聚集了几艘四桨战船，这是两侧都有桨的大型战船

vocabulary.definition: n. 考古学家
vocabulary.context: His letters to Tacitus describing the eruption have helped archaeologists and geologists understand the layers of ash and dirt that cover cities like Pompeii, which were buried in the eruption.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他写给塔西佗的信描述了火山喷发，帮助考古学家和地质学家了解了庞贝城等被火山喷发掩埋的城市所覆盖的火山灰和泥土层

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 呕吐, 喷涌；v.t. 呕出, 喷；n. 呕吐物, 喷涌物
vocabulary.context: But the ground began to shake even more and Mount Vesuvius spewed more ash.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但是地面开始更加摇晃，维苏威火山喷出更多的火山灰

vocabulary.definition: adj. 内陆的, 国内的；n. 内地
vocabulary.context: They decided to head farther inland.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们决定前往更远的内陆地区

vocabulary.definition: n. 专栏, 圆柱, 纵队, 列, 柱形物；[计] 列, 柱形图
vocabulary.context: First, the cloud rose up in a column, like a trunk of a tree.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 首先，云呈柱状升起，像树干一样

vocabulary.definition: n. 描述, 说明, 种类；[经] 说明书(物品), 品名种类, 货物名称
vocabulary.context: Today, those letters from Pliny the Younger contain some of the best descriptions we have of what Roman life was like during his time.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 今天，小普林尼的这些信件包含了我们对他那个时代罗马生活的一些最好的描述

vocabulary.definition: n. 历史学家, 记事者
vocabulary.context: One of Pliny the Younger's friends was a historian named Tacitus.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 小普林尼的一位朋友是一位名叫塔西佗的历史学家

vocabulary.definition: adj. 竭力的, 全部的
vocabulary.context: Brown hoped it would be the start of an all-out war against slavery.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 布朗希望这将是一场反对奴隶制的全面战争的开始

vocabulary.definition: adj. 反对奴隶制度的；n. 反对奴隶制
vocabulary.context: Lovejoy ran an anti-slavery newspaper.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 洛夫乔伊经营一份反奴隶制报纸

vocabulary.definition: n. 废除, 废奴运动；[医] 禁止, 消失
vocabulary.context: Many people in Springfield believed in abolition, or ending slavery.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 斯普林菲尔德的许多人相信废除或结束奴隶制

vocabulary.definition: n. 邪恶, 不幸, 罪恶；adj. 邪恶的, 不幸的, 有害的, 讨厌的
vocabulary.context: But for the first time, he saw the true evils of slavery up close.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但这是他第一次近距离看到奴隶制的真正罪恶

vocabulary.definition: n. 渡船, 渡口；[法] 摆渡营业权, 轮渡
vocabulary.context: Brown is most well known for the surprise attack on Harper's Ferry on October 16, 1859.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 布朗因 1859 年 10 月 16 日对哈珀渡口的突然袭击而闻名

vocabulary.definition: n. 诗, 韵文, 诗句；v.t. 用诗表达；v.i. 作诗
vocabulary.context: He knew the Bible so well he could remember any verse when asked.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他对圣经了如指掌，当有人问他时，他能记住任何一节经文

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不太可能的
vocabulary.context: People thought it was too dangerous and unlikely to succeed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人们认为这太危险，不太可能成功

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 实践, 履行, 实行, 完成, 结束, 满足；[经] 履行(契约), 满期
vocabulary.context: In that way, maybe Brown fulfilled his vow to end slavery.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 通过这种方式，布朗也许履行了他结束奴隶制的誓言

vocabulary.definition: n. 支持, 支撑, 援助, 供养, 支撑物；v.t. 支援, 支撑, 帮助, 支持, 忍受, 供养, 证实；[计] 后援; 支持
vocabulary.context: Although Brown was against slavery his whole life, Kansas was the first time he used violence in support of his beliefs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管布朗一生都反对奴隶制，但堪萨斯州是他第一次使用暴力来支持自己的信仰

vocabulary.definition: n. 谷氨酸盐, 味精, 谷氨酸脂；[医] 谷氨酸盐
vocabulary.context: The taste receptors for umami detect glutamate, an element naturally found in proteins.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 鲜味味觉受体检测谷氨酸，这是蛋白质中天然存在的一种元素

vocabulary.definition: n. 酸味, 性情乖僻, 坏心眼
vocabulary.context: You'll taste sweetness and maybe a little sourness but not much else.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你会尝到甜味，也许还有一点酸味，但除此之外就没有其他味道了

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未熟的, 未成熟的, 生的, 未准备的, 不适时的
vocabulary.context: Sourness might mean a fruit is unripe and indigestible or even spoiled, or it could point out a dangerous acid.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 酸味可能意味着水果未成熟、难以消化甚至变质，或者可能表明存在危险的酸

vocabulary.definition: n. 胰岛素；[化] 胰岛素
vocabulary.context: Sometimes Nature just uses the same receptors." Sweet receptors in the gut can tell the pancreas to release insulin, a hormone that keeps blood sugar levels healthy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有时大自然只是使用相同的受体。"肠道中的甜味受体可以告诉胰腺释放胰岛素，这是一种保持血糖水平健康的激素

vocabulary.definition: n. 酸, 酸类物质, 尖刻, 迷幻药；adj. 酸的, 酸性的, 尖刻的, 敏锐的；[计] 自动文档互参与索引生成程序
vocabulary.context: For this experiment, they measured the sugars, acids, and aroma molecules of 80 varieties of tomatoes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在这个实验中，他们测量了 80 个西红柿品种的糖、酸和香气分子

vocabulary.definition: n. 园艺
vocabulary.context: She says, "I started hanging out with colleagues in horticulture who wanted Florida fruits and vegetables to taste better." One colleague wanted to make tomatoes taste better.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她说："我开始和园艺同事一起出去玩，他们希望佛罗里达的水果和蔬菜味道更好。"一位同事想让西红柿味道更好

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不消化的, 难消化的, 难理解的；[医] 不消化的
vocabulary.context: Sourness might mean a fruit is unripe and indigestible or even spoiled, or it could point out a dangerous acid.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 酸味可能意味着水果未成熟、难以消化甚至变质，或者可能表明存在危险的酸

vocabulary.definition: n. 胰腺；[医] 胰[腺]
vocabulary.context: Sometimes Nature just uses the same receptors." Sweet receptors in the gut can tell the pancreas to release insulin, a hormone that keeps blood sugar levels healthy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有时大自然只是使用相同的受体。"肠道中的甜味受体可以告诉胰腺释放胰岛素，这是一种保持血糖水平健康的激素

vocabulary.definition: n. 香鱼科的小海鱼
vocabulary.context: No visitor to Newfoundland escapes without "kissing the cod," a traditional ceremony also known as being "screeched in." The ceremony involves donning fishermen's clothing, kissing a codfish (or being slapped in the face with one), or biting the head off an uncooked capelin, a small, herring like fish.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 来到纽芬兰的游客都必须"亲吻鳕鱼"，这是一种传统的仪式，也被称为"尖叫"。仪式包括穿上渔民的衣服，亲吻鳕鱼（或用鳕鱼打脸），或者咬下未煮熟的毛鳞鱼（一种像鲱鱼一样的小鱼）的头

vocabulary.definition: n. 鳕
vocabulary.context: No visitor to Newfoundland escapes without "kissing the cod," a traditional ceremony also known as being "screeched in." The ceremony involves donning fishermen's clothing, kissing a codfish (or being slapped in the face with one), or biting the head off an uncooked capelin, a small, herring like fish.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 来到纽芬兰的游客都必须"亲吻鳕鱼"，这是一种传统的仪式，也被称为"尖叫"。仪式包括穿上渔民的衣服，亲吻鳕鱼（或用鳕鱼打脸），或者咬下未煮熟的毛鳞鱼（一种像鲱鱼一样的小鱼）的头

vocabulary.definition: n. 拖网渔船；[法] 拖网船, 拖网捕鱼的船, 拖网捕鱼的人
vocabulary.context: This response resulted in overfishing by fleets of foreign trawlers, and the cod stocks were depleted.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这一反应导致外国拖网渔船队过度捕捞，鳕鱼资源枯竭

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未煮过的
vocabulary.context: No visitor to Newfoundland escapes without "kissing the cod," a traditional ceremony also known as being "screeched in." The ceremony involves donning fishermen's clothing, kissing a codfish (or being slapped in the face with one), or biting the head off an uncooked capelin, a small, herring like fish.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 来到纽芬兰的游客都必须"亲吻鳕鱼"，这是一种传统的仪式，也被称为"尖叫"。仪式包括穿上渔民的衣服，亲吻鳕鱼（或用鳕鱼打脸），或者咬下未煮熟的毛鳞鱼（一种像鲱鱼一样的小鱼）的头

vocabulary.definition: n. 罐头厂；[机] 罐头工厂
vocabulary.context: Numerous Newfoundland families lost their income as fishing rights were taken away and canneries were closed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由于捕鱼权被剥夺和罐头厂关闭，许多纽芬兰家庭失去了收入

vocabulary.definition: n. 法庭, 法官席, 裁决；[法] 法庭, 裁判所, 裁判
vocabulary.context: In 1911, the Hague Tribunal, an international group that met in Holland, awarded Newfoundland control of its bays.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1911年，在荷兰开会的国际组织海牙法庭将其海湾的控制权授予纽芬兰

vocabulary.definition: adv. 一年一次, 每年；[经] 年度的, 每年的
vocabulary.context: Because the fish migrate annually, some fishermen returned to their homes in England at the end of each season.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由于鱼类每年都会洄游，一些渔民在每个季节结束时都会返回英国的家中

vocabulary.definition: adj. 排外的, 独占的, 唯一的；[计] 独占的
vocabulary.context: For 38 years, Newfoundland had exclusive rights to the fish in the area.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 38 年来，纽芬兰对该地区的鱼类拥有专有权

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 在...之前, 优于, 较...优先；v.i. 在前面
vocabulary.context: The moratorium was expected to end in 1994, but when it was estimated that the cod catch had declined 90 percent in the preceding five years, the moratorium was extended.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 暂停期预计将于 1994 年结束，但据估计，鳕鱼捕捞量在过去五年中下降了 90%，因此延长了暂停期

vocabulary.definition: n. 钟形青椒, 主要产于墨西哥。

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她每个季节都会雇用三到四个帮手来种植数百种不同蔬菜的种子，从西兰花到萝卜和甜菜

vocabulary.definition: n. 经销商, 商人；[经] 交易员, 贩卖商
vocabulary.context: In the fall, Tom sells his corn and soybeans to a grain dealer.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 秋天，汤姆把他的玉米和大豆卖给了一位谷物经销商

vocabulary.definition: n. 基础, 主要成分；[化] 基底
vocabulary.context: She mainly sells her food at farmer's markets and to individual customers who visit her farm on a weekly basis.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她主要在农贸市场和每周访问她农场的个人顾客出售食品

vocabulary.definition: n. 系统, 体系, 制度, 方式, 秩序, 分类原则；[计] 系统; 体制; 体系
vocabulary.context: Tom's tractor is connected to a computer and a GPS system to help him plant seeds and distribute chemical fertilizers efficiently.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 汤姆的拖拉机连接到计算机和 GPS 系统，帮助他高效播种和分配化肥

vocabulary.definition: adj. 占星学的, 占星术的
vocabulary.context: Even though Pappa has agreed to pay for two years of community college, but, if I continue to live at home, it won't be long before Dadi arranges some weird match for me with the astrological blessings of her village priest in Gujarat.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管爸爸已经同意支付两年的社区大学费用，但是，如果我继续住在家里，用不了多久，达迪就会在古吉拉特邦乡村牧师的占星祝福下为我安排一些奇怪的比赛

vocabulary.definition: v. 使清洁( sanitize的过去式和过去分词 ); 进行消毒; 审查; 净化
vocabulary.context: I dream of becoming a PA - physician's assistant, wear scrubs, and work in a sanitized doctor's office far away from all the Patels and all the Shahs who spend all their lives either in a Dunkin' or Subway kitchen loading unloading soiled crates of milk, buns and doughnuts.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我梦想成为一名 PA--医生助理，穿着手术服，在一个经过消毒的医生办公室工作，远离所有帕特尔家族和国王，他们一生都在 Dunkin' 或 Subway 厨房里装卸肮脏的牛奶、面包和甜甜圈

vocabulary.definition: n. 湿疹；[医] 湿疹
vocabulary.context: "Yes..." - my fingers find the raw eczema patch on my inner elbow again - "...but we don't eat watermelon peels."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "是的......" - 我的手指再次找到肘部内侧的湿疹斑 - "......但我们不吃西瓜皮。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 极好的, 主要的, 一流的；n. 除顶部, 修剪树稍, 剪落之小树枝
vocabulary.context: Since my best friend works at the Pizza Hut on the weekends, she gets preferred pricing that is so discounted it costs her next to nothing to buy a large pie with all the toppings.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由于我最好的朋友周末在必胜客工作，所以她得到了优惠价格，折扣如此之大，以至于她几乎不需要花任何钱就可以买一个包含所有配料的大馅饼

vocabulary.definition: n. 块, 团
vocabulary.context: Besides, Dadi feeds Manek everything with a dollop of butter on top.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 此外，达迪给马内克喂所有东西，上面放一块黄油

vocabulary.definition: adj. 带淡红色的, 比较激进的
vocabulary.context: Adriana and I have sworn a pinky promise on this one.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 阿德里亚娜和我对此宣誓了一个小小的承诺

vocabulary.definition: n. 莎丽服
vocabulary.context: Dadi's saree is wrapped tight around her, like armor.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大迪的纱丽像铠甲一样紧紧包裹着她

vocabulary.definition: n. 毒理学, 毒物学；[医] 毒理学, 毒物学
vocabulary.context: Aren't vegetable peels toxic?" I ask Adriana, who is so smart that she beat hundred other freshman applicants to get selected for a day camp on toxicology at our state university.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 蔬菜皮不是有毒吗？"我问阿德里安娜，她非常聪明，击败了其他数百名新生申请者，被选中参加我们州立大学的毒理学日间营

vocabulary.definition: n. 偶然发现珍宝的运气/才能, 易遇奇缘的运气
vocabulary.context: "Supreme serendipity, Minal..." Ms. LeBlanc says, "A Pulitzer Prize winning author pickled melon rinds, too."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "真是机缘巧合，米纳尔......"勒布朗女士说，"普利策奖获奖作家，也是腌瓜皮。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 又苦又甜的, 苦乐参半的；[医] 白英, 蜀羊泉
vocabulary.context: The pungent spicy aroma from Pyrex dishes on the kitchen counter fill me with bittersweet.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 厨房柜台上的耐热玻璃餐具散发出刺鼻的辛辣香气，让我苦乐参半

vocabulary.definition: adj. 坏人似的, 恶棍的, 罪恶的, 极坏的；[法] 歹徒的:邪恶的, 恶的
vocabulary.context: The Viper was no sooner revived by the warmth than it turned 3 4 upon its benefactor and inflicted a fatal bite upon him; and as the poor man lay dying, he cried, "I have only got what I deserved, for taking compassion on so villainous a creature." Kindness is thrown away upon the evil.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 毒蛇一被温暖苏醒，就转向它的恩人，并对其咬了一口致命的伤口。当这个可怜的人临终时，他哭喊道："我只是得到了我应得的，因为我对如此邪恶的生物表示同情。"善良被邪恶所抛弃

vocabulary.definition: n. 军人用小型提箱( footlocker的名词复数 )
vocabulary.context: Secretly, at night, careful not to attract the attention of the Islamic police who patrolled the city, he and his team brought hundreds of footlockers to sneak the manuscripts out of the Institute.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 晚上，为了不引起在城市巡逻的伊斯兰警察的注意，他和他的团队偷偷地带了数百个储物柜，将手稿偷偷带出研究所

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使成为数字, 使计数化, 使数字化；[计] 数字化
vocabulary.context: Now the manuscripts are digitized on computers and cataloged so that people around the world will always be able to see them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 现在，这些手稿已在计算机上数字化并编目，以便世界各地的人们始终能够看到它们

vocabulary.definition: n. 笔迹, 书法
vocabulary.context: While Europe was still in the Middle Ages, the scholars of Timbuktu created hundreds of thousands of manuscripts in beautiful calligraphy (decorative handwriting) that discuss every possible subject: astronomy, poetry, mathematics, medicine, botany, religion, law, politics, and history.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当欧洲仍处于中世纪时，廷巴克图的学者们用美丽的书法（装饰性手写体）创作了数十万份手稿，讨论了每一个可能的主题：天文学、诗歌、数学、医学、植物学、宗教、法律、政治和历史

vocabulary.context: While Europe was still in the Middle Ages, the scholars of Timbuktu created hundreds of thousands of manuscripts in beautiful calligraphy (decorative handwriting) that discuss every possible subject: astronomy, poetry, mathematics, medicine, botany, religion, law, politics, and history.

vocabulary.context: While Europe was still in the Middle Ages, the scholars of Timbuktu created hundreds of thousands of manuscripts in beautiful calligraphy (decorative handwriting) that discuss every possible subject: astronomy, poetry, mathematics, medicine, botany, religion, law, politics, and history.

vocabulary.definition: n. 男人, 人类, 人；v.t. 为...配备人手, 操纵, 使振奋；[计] 城域网, 手册
vocabulary.context: Then dozens of volunteer drivers, passing through checkpoints manned by police and jihadis with assault rifles, making many dangerous trips back and forth, sneaked them out of north Mali and south to safety in Bamako, the capital.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随后，数十名志愿司机通过警察和圣战分子持突击步枪把守的检查站，进行多次危险的来回行程，将他们偷偷地从马里北部和南部带到首都巴马科的安全地带

vocabulary.definition: n. 手稿, 原稿, 底稿；adj. 手写的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 坚硬的, 刚性的, 严格的, 精密的, 刻板的
vocabulary.context: But when Al Qaeda overtook all of north Mali in 2012, they enforced a rigid version of Islamic law.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但当基地组织于 2012 年占领整个马里北部时，他们执行了严格的伊斯兰法

vocabulary.definition: n. 音乐学
vocabulary.context: My father left China as a young man of 25 in 1936 to study at the Sorbonne in Paris, where he received a doctorate in musicology.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1936年，25岁的我父亲离开中国，前往巴黎索邦大学学习，并在那里获得了音乐学博士学位

vocabulary.definition: n. 内部的人, 权威人士, 知道内情的人；[经] 熟悉内情者
vocabulary.context: I started to become comfortable with being both an outsider and an insider in a place.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我开始适应在一个地方既是局外人又是局内人

vocabulary.definition: adv. 与生命有关地, 致命地, 紧要地
vocabulary.context: I think it is vitally important that all of us try to listen carefully to everyone around us and try to enlarge our way of experiencing life.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我认为至关重要的是，我们所有人都应该仔细倾听周围每个人的意见，并尝试扩大我们体验生活的方式

vocabulary.definition: n. 大提琴
vocabulary.context: Part of his fame may come from the fact that he has been playing the cello for most of his life - since he was four years old.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的名声部分可能来自于他从四岁起就一直在演奏大提琴

vocabulary.definition: adj. 父亲的, 父系的, 似父亲的, 得自父亲的, 家长式统治的；[法] 父系的, 父亲的
vocabulary.context: We have been able to trace my paternal ancestry back 18 generations to the year 1217.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们已经能够将我的父系血统追溯到 1217 年 18 代

vocabulary.definition: n. 墓地；死网
vocabulary.context: That is where our ancestral Ma gravesite is located.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那就是我们马氏祖坟所在的地方

vocabulary.definition: n. 小提琴演奏者, 小提琴家
vocabulary.context: Your father, a violinist, and your mother, a singer, moved from Nanjing, China, to Paris, France.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你的父亲是一位小提琴家，你的母亲是一位歌手，从中国南京搬到了法国巴黎

vocabulary.definition: adj. 负债的, 受惠的；[法] 负债的, 法律上有义务偿还的
vocabulary.context: I believe that famous American artists who are ultimately indebted to Dvorák include the jazz musician Duke Ellington, the composer Aaron Copland, and the composer and pianist George Gershwin.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我相信，最终受益于德沃夏克的美国著名艺术家包括爵士音乐家杜克·艾灵顿、作曲家亚伦·科普兰以及作曲家和钢琴家乔治·格什温

vocabulary.context: and then moves on.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后继续

vocabulary.definition: v. 将…再次（重新）分类( reclassify的过去式和过去分词 )
vocabulary.context: With growing numbers, The IUCN Red List of Threatened Species reclassified P-horses from extinct in the wild to critically endangered in 2008.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随着数量的不断增加，世界自然保护联盟濒危物种红色名录于 2008 年将 P 马从野外灭绝重新分类为极度濒危

vocabulary.definition: adj. 纯种的；n. 纯种动物
vocabulary.context: In addition, Mongolians interbred P-horses with domesticated horses which reduced the number of purebred, wild P-horses even more.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 此外，蒙古人将P马与驯养马杂交，这进一步减少了纯种野生P马的数量

vocabulary.definition: v. （使）异种交配, （使）混种, （使）杂种繁殖( interbreed的过去式和过去分词 )
vocabulary.context: In addition, Mongolians interbred P-horses with domesticated horses which reduced the number of purebred, wild P-horses even more.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 此外，蒙古人将P马与驯养马杂交，这进一步减少了纯种野生P马的数量

vocabulary.definition: n. 马；adj. 马的, 象马的
vocabulary.context: The P-horse looks like a mash-up of its equine relatives.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: P-马看起来像是它的马科亲戚的混合体

vocabulary.definition: n. 地理学者
vocabulary.context: The P-horse came to their attention when Nikolai Przewalski, a geographer and explorer, sent a skull to the Zoological Museum of the Russian Academy of Science.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当地理学家兼探险家尼古拉·普热瓦尔斯基将一个头骨送到俄罗斯科学院动物博物馆时，P-马引起了他们的注意

vocabulary.definition: adj. 动物学的
vocabulary.context: The P-horse came to their attention when Nikolai Przewalski, a geographer and explorer, sent a skull to the Zoological Museum of the Russian Academy of Science.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当地理学家兼探险家尼古拉·普热瓦尔斯基将一个头骨送到俄罗斯科学院动物博物馆时，P-马引起了他们的注意

vocabulary.definition: v. 突升, 猛涨( skyrocket的过去式和过去分词 )
vocabulary.context: In about 70 years, P-horse numbers skyrocketed from only 31 P-horses living in two European zoos to nearly 1,000 horses living in 129 zoos in 33 different countries.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在大约 70 年的时间里，P-马的数量从仅生活在两个欧洲动物园的 31 匹 P-马猛增到生活在 33 个不同国家的 129 个动物园的近 1,000 匹马

vocabulary.definition: adj. 前进的, 进行的, 不间断的；n. 前进, 发展
vocabulary.context: To survive, P-horses need ongoing help.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为了生存，P 马需要持续的帮助

vocabulary.definition: n. 电极；[化] 电极; 焊条; 电焊条
vocabulary.context: That cap held 64 small sensors called electrodes .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那个帽子装有 64 个称为电极的小传感器

vocabulary.definition: n. 毫秒；[计] 毫秒
vocabulary.context: And those areas did so for longer periods - up to 500 milliseconds.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些区域这样做的时间更长--长达 500 毫秒

vocabulary.definition: adj. 发展的, 进化的, 启发的；[医] 发育的
vocabulary.context: His team's results appear in the April issue of Developmental Cognitive Neuroscience .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的团队的研究结果发表在《发育认知神经科学》四月号上

vocabulary.definition: v. 剥头皮；n. 头皮, 战利品
vocabulary.context: The cap held these against the child's scalp and recorded electrical signals as they sparked between the child's brain cells.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 帽子将它们固定在孩子的头皮上，并记录它们在孩子脑细胞之间发出的电信号

vocabulary.definition: n. 神经系统科学( 指神经病学、 神经化学等)

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 圣地亚哥动物园生殖科学主任芭芭拉·杜兰特·亨肖 (Barbara Durrant Henshaw) 表示："尽管爱德华不知道今天是他的生日，但看到爱德华--一头健康、强壮的犀牛跑来跑去，享受着他的特殊待遇，真是太特别了。"

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 患病, 使厌倦, 使恶心；v.i. 生病, 作呕
vocabulary.context: In zoonotic diseases, animals serve as a pathogen's host . Over time, some long-term hosts no longer become sickened. When a virus commonly lives inside an animal without harming it, that host is now called a reservoir . For instance, birds - especially ducks - have evolved into a natural reservoir for flu viruses.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在人畜共患病中，动物是病原体的宿主。随着时间的推移，一些长期宿主不再生病。当病毒通常生活在动物体内而不伤害动物时，该宿主现在被称为宿主。例如，鸟类--尤其是鸭子--已经进化成为流感病毒的天然宿主

vocabulary.definition: adj. 病毒的, 病毒引起的；[医] 病毒的

vocabulary.context: "You can practice in front of me then," Auntie Thandi said, digging a spoon into the sadza and gravy Nothukula had prepared.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "那你可以在我面前练习，"坦迪阿姨说着，把勺子挖进了诺图库拉准备好的萨扎和肉汁里

vocabulary.definition: adj. 喜欢说话的, 饶舌的, 多嘴的
vocabulary.context: Nothukula loved poetry, but her thoughts drifted off to her old life with her mother and father, ubude Moffat and all her friends back home, where she was a talkative, happy little bird who was always writing, speaking, and even teaching the other kids new words to say.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 诺图库拉热爱诗歌，但她的思绪却飘到了她与父母、乌布德·莫法特和她所有朋友在一起的旧生活，在那里她是一只健谈、快乐的小鸟，总是写作、说话，甚至教其他孩子说新单词

vocabulary.definition: n. 后翻式；后滚翻；倒翻筋斗；v.i. 后空翻；表演后空翻
vocabulary.context: Nothukula's stomach was doing backflips and cartwheels.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 诺图库拉的胃在做后空翻和侧手翻

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可选择的, 随意的；[化] 选购的
vocabulary.context: "It's not optional, Nothukula," Ms.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "这不是可选的，Nothukula，"女士说

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不完全地, 有缺点地, 不完备地
vocabulary.context: Standing tall in her kitchen, Nothukula proceeded to recite the poem, proudly and imperfectly, entirely in her own voice.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 诺图库拉站在厨房里，自豪地、不完美地完全用她自己的声音背诵了这首诗

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无感觉的, 无情的, 冷酷的
vocabulary.context: They're so cold, and unfeeling, as if I am invisible.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们如此冷酷无情，仿佛我是隐形的

vocabulary.definition: n. 侄女, 甥女
vocabulary.context: While Auntie Thandi worked sixty hours a week in the emergency room, her niece was a quiet little mouse, helping out with the cooking and household chores.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虽然坦迪阿姨每周在急诊室工作六十个小时，但她的侄女却是一只安静的小老鼠，帮忙做饭和做家务

vocabulary.definition: n. 野豆, 落花生
vocabulary.context: In his mind, he could see people preparing all kinds of food over open flames: beans and rice in large pots, grilled fish, roasted corn, and groundnut soup.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在他的脑海里，他可以看到人们在明火上准备各种食物：大锅里的豆子和米饭，烤鱼，烤玉米，花生汤

vocabulary.definition: interj. 再见, 你好, 祝君健康
vocabulary.context: In this satchel he carried a snack his mother prepared for him, sometimes fruit, sometimes chin-chin." Kojo held the satchel high.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在这个书包里，他带着妈妈为他准备的零食，有时是水果，有时是下巴。"科乔高举着书包

vocabulary.definition: n. 一种大腊肠
vocabulary.context: If only he could convince his grandmother that a bologna sandwich in a paper bag would be ideal.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果他能让他的祖母相信纸袋里的博洛尼亚三明治是理想的选择就好了

vocabulary.definition: adj. 样子好的, 做工考究的, 匀称的, 情节安排得很好的
vocabulary.context: That is a well-made bag you have there.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你那儿的包包做工精良

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不整齐的, 肮脏的, 破旧的, 褴褛的
vocabulary.context: Kojo carefully placed his worn, scruffy bag on the table and spread his meal before him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Kojo小心翼翼地将他破旧、肮脏的包放在桌子上，然后将饭菜铺在他面前

vocabulary.definition: n. <美>(蘸玉米面糊食用的)玉米"热狗"
vocabulary.context: "My name is Kojo, and it's none of your business!" Kojo glared at Christopher, who smirked, turned in his seat, and took a huge bite of his corndog.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我叫小城，不关你的事！"科乔瞪了克里斯托弗一眼，后者得意地笑着，在座位上转过身，咬了一大口玉米热狗

vocabulary.definition: n. 拉链

vocabulary.definition: n. [植]羽衣甘蓝
vocabulary.context: She also grew collard greens and yams.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她还种植羽衣甘蓝和山药

vocabulary.definition: adj. 厨房的, 烹调用的
vocabulary.context: Some days, at his old school, the cafeteria looked like the International House of Culinary Cuisine.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有时候，在他原来的学校，自助餐厅看起来就像国际烹饪之家
